title: AI Research Operator
description:
This is not a traditional EA role. If you are looking for calendar management and inbox work, this is not for you. This role is for someone who is genuinely curious about AI, obsessed with structure, and gets satisfaction from turning chaos into clarity for someone else.



About the Role

I am an AI content creator. I create content for non-technical business owners across TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, and a weekly newsletter, making AI simple, practical, and actionable for everyday people.

I am the face, the ideas, and the voice. What I need is someone behind the scenes who captures everything, organizes it, and makes sure nothing falls through the cracks.



What You Will Own



AI Research and News

• Deliver a daily curated AI news digest, scored and filtered for relevance to my audience

• Research new AI tools and return a clear recommendation: worth covering or not, and why

• Monitor key sources (newsletters, X, LinkedIn, YouTube) and flag anything I need to know

• Summarize findings in plain English, structured and easy to scan



Task and Project Management

• Own the project board: capture all incoming tasks, assign priorities, and set deadlines

• Send a clear weekly plan every Monday with what is happening and what needs my input

• Flag deadline risks at least 3 days in advance, not after the fact

• Break vague briefs into scoped tasks with a clear definition of done



Documentation and Systems

• Document how tools and systems are set up so I am never flying blind

• Maintain a living reference of the tech stack, what each tool does, and how they connect

• Write clear process notes when new workflows are established



Research on Request

• When I ask how something works, return a structured top-down explanation, not scattered notes

• Output must be clear enough for a non-technical person to act on immediately

• Research can cover AI tools, platforms, technical concepts, or business topics



What This Role Is Not

• You will not be building, coding, or deploying technical systems

• You will not be making creative decisions about content

• You will not be managing brand partnerships or finances

• You will not be waiting to be asked before flagging a problem



Who You Are

• Based in the Philippines, available for regular async communication

• Obsessively organized, you find satisfaction in structure and order

• Proactive communicator, you send updates before being asked

• Strong written English, clear and concise with no fluff

• Comfortable using AI tools including ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, or similar

• You have worked with a solo founder, content creator, or newsletter operator before

• You understand that a missed deadline has a direct cost to someone else's business

• You are the opposite of scattered. You are the person who organizes scattered people



Tools We Use

• ClickUp for project management

• Claude, Claude code, OpenClaw, Gemini and ChatGPT 

• Google Drive and Google Workspace

• Beehiiv for newsletter

• Slack or similar for async communication

• We also test a large range of AI tools on a daily basis



How to Apply



Send a short application (under 300 words) that answers these three questions:

• Describe a time you organized something chaotic for someone else. What did you do and what was the outcome?

• What is one AI tool you have used recently and what did you use it for?

• How do you personally stay on top of deadlines and priorities when managing multiple tasks?

Applications that are vague, generic, or over 300 words will not be considered. Heading should be one word you're best at. Attention to detail starts here.

title: Strategic Account Manager - Tech
description:
Strategic Account Manager - Tech



We're looking for a Strategic Account Manager to help a Tiktok influencer expand and deepen brand partnerships within the tech industry. We create educational AI Automation content and tools to help companies optimize their use of technology.



Job Summary

We need a Strategic Account Manager who understands tech, brand partnerships with tech/AI companies. This role involves responding to inbound brand partnership enquiries, managing existing client relations, negotiating and aligning our partnership strategies with our business goals.



This is a long term, on going position for the right person. If you're interested, please include your number one skill in the subject line. Inside the message please tell me why you would be a great fit.



Key Responsibilities

- New Partnerships: Manage brand partnership deals for Tiktok influencer in the tech sector.

- Manage Existing Accounts: Maintain and enhance relationships with current partners to ensure their ongoing satisfaction and engagement.

- Strategic Planning: Collaborate with our leadership to craft strategies that support our business objectives.

- Market Analysis: Stay updated on industry trends to keep our strategies relevant and effective.

- Negotiate Deals: Lead discussions to secure beneficial partnership agreements.

- Reporting: Provide regular updates on account status and strategic insights



What we're looking for:

- At least 5 years of experience in account management or business development, preferably in technology.

- Strong strategic thinking and negotiation skills.

- Excellent communication abilities.

- Capable of managing multiple projects with a keen attention to detail.





If you would like to apply, please message me. We are hiring asap.

Successful candidates will be sent an NDA to sign before proceeding to a paid trial (4-6hrs). After this we will be choosing the successful candidate.

title: Technical Customer Support @ VoiceDash AI
description:
At VoiceDash AI, we are redefining how users interact with voice technology. As our Technical Customer Support specialist, you won’t just be answering questions; you’ll be a product expert, a troubleshooter, and a community builder. You are the bridge between our cutting-edge AI and the people who use it to power their lives and businesses.



The Role: What You’ll Do

- Be Everywhere: Manage and respond to user inquiries across Online Chat,
, our Product Community, and 
.

- Solve, Don't Just Script: Handle basic to intermediate technical troubleshooting. If a user is stuck, you’re the one who guides them out.

- Get Hands-On: When a chat isn't enough, you’ll hop on screen-share sessions to diagnose and fix issues in real-time.

- Advocate for the User: Spot recurring bugs or friction points and report them directly to the engineering team.

- The Startup "Plus": In a fast-paced environment, you might help with documentation, film "how-to" clips, or moderate 
; basically, you're ready to help wherever the fire is.



Who You Are

- Fluent in English: Your written and spoken English is top-tier. You can explain complex technical concepts in a way that feels simple and human.

- Technically Curious: You don’t need to be a developer, but you aren't afraid of APIs, browser consoles, or software integrations.

- The "Fixer" Mentality: You get a dopamine hit from solving a user's problem and seeing that "Thank you!" message.

- Startup Ready: You thrive in a bit of chaos, you're proactive, and you don’t wait for a manual to tell you what to do.



Bonus Points For:

- Experience with AI or Voice-tech products.

- Experience managing 
 communities.



How to Apply

Ready to join the team? Send an
 to 
 with the subject line: "Technical Support Candidate - [Your Name]".



Please include:



Your Resume

The "60-Second Intro": Attach a short (under 1 minute) video or a link (Loom/Google Drive) introducing yourself and explaining the most interesting technical problem you’ve ever solved for a customer.



Tip: This helps us see your communication style and how you handle "screen-time" - essential for the screen-share parts of the job!

title: Creative Performance Marketer & Media Buyer
description:
We’re Hiring: Creative Performance Marketer & Media Buyer (Full-time)



We’re looking for an experienced Creative Performance Marketer & Media Buyer who can create and edit high-performing content and support our growth across Google Ads, SEO, and Shopify optimization.



This is a content-first + performance role. Meta Ads are managed internally, but you will play a key role in testing creatives, identifying winning ads, and guiding performance strategy, while also handling Google Ads as the media buyer.



We operate two growing Shopify brands, currently focused on the Dutch market, and are preparing to expand into Europe in Q2 with your support.



What you will do

Create new video and photo content for Meta Ads (UGC style, hooks, angles)



Develop and test new hooks, concepts and creative variations



Identify and scale winning ads based on performance data

Support in creative strategy for Meta Ads (what to test, what to improve)



Improve SEO and organic visibility



Optimize our Shopify store (product pages, content, conversion improvements)



Work with our existing content library and continuously improve it



How we work



This is a long-term position



Weekly Monday call to align on priorities



Focus on:



Creating and improving ad creatives



Editing videos and testing new hooks



Scaling what works



Improving performance across Meta (creative), Google Ads and SEO



What we are looking for



Strong experience in video editing and content creation for ads



Proven ability to create high CTR, high-converting creatives



Experience as a media buyer (Google Ads required)



Understanding of Meta Ads performance and creative testing



Good knowledge of SEO and Shopify optimization



Experience in e-commerce / Shopify



Ability to work data-driven and performance-focused



Must be able to show recent and relevant results with clients



What we offer



Full-time position (long-term)



Monthly budget of $500 (max)



Work with growing e-commerce brands



Access to a large content library



Direct impact on scaling ads and performance



Opportunity to expand into the European market together in Q2



Clear structure with weekly check-ins



Interested?



Send your application + recent work (ads, creatives, results).

title: Bookkeeper (Property Management Assistant)
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Bookkeeper to support our property management and accounting operations. The ideal candidate will have experience handling financial tasks within a property management environment, including rent collections, bank reconciliations, accounts payable, and tenant renewals. This role requires strong organizational skills, excellent customer service abilities, and proficiency in Appfolio. 



The Bookkeeper will work closely with landlords, tenants, and internal teams to ensure accurate financial records, timely payments, and smooth day-to-day financial operations in a remote setting.



Key Responsibilities:



Manage rent collections, track payments, and follow up on outstanding balances

Perform accurate bank reconciliations and maintain up-to-date financial records

Process accounts payable, including vendor invoices and expense tracking

Assist with tenant renewals, lease updates, and financial documentation

Provide professional customer service to tenants, landlords, and vendors

Communicate regularly with remote landlords regarding financial reports and account updates

Maintain organized bookkeeping records in Appfolio

Reconcile rent rolls, ledgers, and payment reports

Support month-end and year-end closing processes

Monitor financial discrepancies and resolve issues promptly

Assist with financial reporting and data entry as needed



Qualifications:



Proven experience in bookkeeping, accounting, or property management accounting

Proficiency in Appfolio (required)

Experience with bank reconciliation, accounts payable, and rent collections

Strong understanding of tenant renewals and property management financial workflows

Excellent customer service and communication skills

Highly organized with strong attention to detail

Ability to work independently in a remote environment

Strong time management and multitasking skills

Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets is a plus



Preferred Skills:



Experience working with remote landlords or property management companies

Knowledge of rent tracking systems or property management software

Familiarity with lease administration and tenant financial processes

Problem-solving mindset with a high level of accountability



Benefits:**

Fully remote

Salary - $4 per hour x 40 hours in a week (salary every Friday)

Opportunities for professional development and growth.

Dynamic and supportive work environment.

Full time, Monday through Friday, EST schedule

Job Security and Stability

PTO

Inclusive Culture

Upskilling Opportunities

100% Work-From-Home

Exceptionally Supportive Team

Opportunities for Career Growth

USB Headset with Noise Cancellation feature

title: Hotel & Hospitality Wholesale Outreach Specialist
description:
Overview

We are seeking a hands-on, execution-focused Wholesale Outreach Specialist to build a predictable pipeline of opportunities within the luxury hotel and hospitality sector. Our brand is a premium craft cookie company built for 
nts of celebration and indulgence.



In this role, you will own the top-of-funnel sales process: sourcing the right contacts, running multi-touch outreach campaigns, and teeing up warm conversations for the founder to close.

Work Structure & Compensation

Hours: Part-time (20 hours per week)

Timezone: Must be available to work within Central Time (CST)

Exclusivity: Candidates MUST NOT have a concurrent full-time job to ensure dedicated focus on our pipeline growth.



Key Responsibilities



1. Lead Sourcing & List Building

Identify and build targeted lead lists across boutique hotels, luxury concierge teams, and hotel management groups

Research and validate contact details for key decision-makers, specifically Food & Beverage Directors and Guest Experience Managers

Maintain clean, structured lead lists segmented by region, channel, and job title[cite: 884].



2. Outreach & Pipeline Management

Execute personalized, multi-touch
 campaigns using a warm, premium, and concise tone

Manage daily replies: qualify interest, answer basic questions, and move the conversation forward

Track all activity and pipeline status in a CRM (HubSpot/Apollo) or structured Google Sheet

Prepare "handoff briefs" for the founder, providing context on warm leads ready for closing calls



3. Reporting & Optimization

Provide weekly reporting with visual KPI tracking, including leads added, reply rates, and positive response rates

Identify what is working or failing and propose workflow changes to improve results[cite: 902].



Required Skills & Experience

Mandatory Hotel Experience: Direct professional experience within the hotel industry is required.

Sales Background: Proven track record in hotel sales, specifically candidates who have transitioned from Inside Sales to Outside Sales and understand the drivers that close hotel deals.

Decision-Maker Knowledge: Deep familiarity with hotel organizational structures and how to effectively navigate them to reach decision-makers.

Technical Proficiency: Comfortable building lead lists and running outbound campaigns end-to-end using tools like Apollo or HubSpot



Attributes: Extremely organized with follow-ups and pipeline tracking, high ownership, and fast execution speed.



Advantageous

Experience selling premium food, gifting, or amenities specifically into luxury hotels.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a **Loom video** (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.

title: Home Health Quality Assurance (QA) Specialist
description:
Job Summary:

We are looking for a detail-oriented Philippine Registered Nurse (PHRN) to join our team as a Home Health QA Specialist. You will be responsible for ensuring clinical documentation—including OASIS assessments and Plans of Care (485)—meets Medicare Conditions of Participation (CoPs) and agency standards for accuracy, compliance, and reimbursement.



Key Responsibilities:

Clinical Chart Audits: Review clinical notes (SN, PT, OT, ST) for accuracy, completeness, and medical necessity.

OASIS Review: Audit OASIS assessments for congruency with visit notes and patient condition.

Compliance Monitoring: Ensure all documentation follows Medicare guidelines and state/federal regulatory requirements.

Plan of Care (485) Oversight: Validate and review Plans of Care for compliance before physician submission.

Clinician Feedback: Provide professional feedback and education to field staff to improve documentation quality.

Reporting: Track and trend quality indicators like hospitalizations, falls, and adverse events for QAPI programs



Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Nursing with an Active PHRN License.

Experience: Minimum 1–3 years of Home Health experience; prior experience in clinical auditing or QA preferred.

Technical Skills: Proficiency with EMR systems  WellSky/Kinnser

Knowledge: Strong understanding of OASIS-E, PDGM, and ICD-10 coding.

Work Setup: Stable internet connection and a dedicated home office for a remote shift.

| Hourly: approximately $5.12 per hour depending on experience and certifications like USRN)



PLEASE ATTACH YOUR CV.  REQUESTS SUBMITTED WITHOUT A CV WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.  DO NOT APPLY F YOU DO NOT HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH KINNSR AND HOME HEALTH QA

title: Video Editor - Fast-Paced Short-Form Content
description:
Video Editor — Fast-Paced Short-Form Content



We are looking for a video editor who specialises in high-retention, fast-paced short-form editing.



This role is best suited to someone who understands anime-inspired editing styles, internet culture, modern TikTok pacing, strong rhythm, sharp cuts, engaging visual structure, and attention-driven sequencing. You should know how to create edits that feel energetic, current, and built to hold attention.



A strong understanding of basic colour correction and overall visual polish is also important. We are looking for someone who can make footage feel cleaner, more consistent, and more visually appealing without overprocessing it.



We are not looking for editors whose style is primarily based in corporate, commercial, real estate, talking-head, or slow-paced promotional content. While that type of editing has its place, it is not what this role requires.



The editor we hire should be confident with:



fast, engaging pacing



strong timing and rhythm



sharp cut selection



attention-grabbing visual flow



anime, 
, or internet-native editing sensibilities



basic colour correction and visual clean-up



edits designed to stop scroll and hold attention



We want someone who already understands this style well, not someone trying to force a traditional business editing style into short-form content.



(examples)





If applying, please make sure your portfolio reflects fast-paced short-form work that matches this direction.

title: Offshore Senior Bookkeeper
description:
Background of Company:



One Stop Tax Strategists is co-founded by two dynamic sisters Tiffany and Melanie, inspired by their father Byron, a CPA with over 30 years of experience. Our company specializes in creative tax planning, preparation, bookkeeping, and payroll for entrepreneurs around the USA. Our client base is made up of about 70% real estate investors, spread across multiple US states. We are committed to helping our clients pay the least tax legally possible, enabling them to fund their dreams.



Our mission is to bring peace to taxes and purpose to profits to help our clients & team live more.



To get a feel for who we are, check out our WEBSITE ( 
 )!



The Best Applicant Will Be:

We are seeking a highly skilled bookkeeper with a minimum of 2 years of experience (U.S. tax experience as a bonus) who thrives in a professional, structured, and remote work environment. The ideal candidate is disciplined, detail-oriented, precise, and accountable, with a strong commitment to delivering high-quality service. We are looking for a grinder—someone who is hardworking, thorough, and dedicated, willing to go the extra mile to get the job done right. If you are a conscientious and reliable tax professional seeking a long-term opportunity to make an impact, we’d love to hear from you.



START DAY/TIME:

Soonest is preferred, but we understand if you need to start sometime in March or later. We are looking for the right person, not the first person.



ROLE & RESPONSIBILITIES

Have a minimum of 2 years of work in the bookkeeping or accounting field, and USA tax experience preferred, but not required.

Bookkeeping & Transaction Management

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records using QuickBooks Online (QBO), QuickBooks Desktop (QBD), and/or Excel. 

- Record, categorize, and reconcile financial transactions including income, expenses, journal entries, and transfers.

- Perform monthly, quarterly, and year-end reconciliations for bank accounts, credit cards, and loans.

- Complete basic accounting tasks such as updating financial records and reviewing bank and credit card statements.



Financial Reporting & Analysis

 - Prepare and review monthly and annual financial reports including Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow statements.

 - Generate additional financial reports for internal tea
mbers or management as needed.

 - Identify discrepancies, missing transactions, or unusual activity and resolve issues promptly.

 - Assist with year-end bookkeeping and tax preparation processes.

 - Maintain strict client confidentiality regarding financial records, tax information, and personal documents.



Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable & Payroll Support

 - Monitor accounts payable and accounts receivable activity to ensure accurate recording.

 - Track invoices, payments, and outstanding balances as needed.

 - Record and reconcile payroll transactions and employee-related expenses.



Systems, Accuracy & Quality Control

 - Ensure financial data is accurate, organized, and maintained according to defined accounting standards and procedures.

 - Maintain proper chart of accounts structure and ensure correct transaction categorization.

 - Utilize accounting and business tools such as QuickBooks, Excel, Outlook, Lacerte, and other software platforms (training provided as needed).

 -This role requires consistent, steady, and accurate work based on defined regulations and standards.



Team Collaboration & Remote Work Environment

 - Work effectively with supervisors and internal tea
mbers to complete assigned bookkeeping tasks.

 - Participate in weekly 1:1 meetings and daily team huddles.

 - Communicate with the internal team via Zoom, Zoom Chat, and
.

 - Manage multiple projects while maintaining organization and a sense of urgency in a fast-paced environment.

 - This is a 100% remote position, requiring a dedicated workspace, reliable computer equipment, and high-speed internet.



Pay & Benefits

 - This is a full-time position, with a base hourly rate ranging from $9–$15 USD, depending on experience.

      **After the first year, employees may be eligible for a performance-based bonus tied to company EBITDA.

      **Candidates with significant experience and exceptional qualifications may be considered for compensation outside of the listed range.

 - Benefits and compensation structure are negotiable, depending on how the employee prefers their pay to be structured.

     **The company plans to offer 13th month pay and a number of paid holidays, which will be discussed during the hiring process.



Core Values:

1. Growth - Embracing change and learning.

2. Integrity - Leading by example with honesty.

3. Fun - Fostering a light-hearted and enjoyable workplace.

4. Vitality - Living purposefully and embracing each 
nt.

5. Teamwork - Unified commitment to our mission and success.

6. Ownership - Taking responsibility and delivering meaningful results.



Next Steps:

1. Complete the Predictive Index survey HERE: (



)

       **The survey will allow you to tell us more about yourself.

       **It is incredibly easy and only takes about 6 minutes to complete.

       **Please take it on a desktop/laptop because a smartphone screen will be too small.



2. Send me your favorite animal and dessert to eat



Thank you for your time and interest!

title: Venture Project Lead -  (Start ASAP)

1. Take full ownership of new initiatives once an idea is introduced

2. Clarify project scope, objectives, and success criteria

3. Drive projects from research through execution and delivery

5. Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Work Requirements:

title: Outbound Patient Specialists (Mandarin and English Speakers)
description:
Are you fluent in Mandarin and Cantonese? Do you have a warm, friendly personality and a passion for helping others? We’re looking for Outbound Patient Engagement Specialists to join our team and connect with our valued patients, right from the comfort of your home!



About the Role:

You'll be reaching out to patients via phone to check in, provide updates, and ensure they feel supported and cared for. This is more than just a customer service role—it’s about building meaningful relationships and making a difference in people’s lives every day.



What You’ll Do:



Make outbound calls to our patients, completing at least 45–50 calls per day (script provided).

Share updates about their care or services.

Ask how we can better support them and address any concerns.

Deliver exceptional and compassionate service with every call.

Develop rapport and build trust with patients.

Answer incoming calls professionally and courteously.

End each call on a positive note, leaving patients with a smile.





What We’re Looking For:

Fluency in Mandarin or Cantonese and English (required)

Strong communication and interpersonal skills

A warm, friendly, and engaging phone presence

Experience in customer service or patient outreach is a plus

Reliable internet and a quiet space to work remotely

Ability to work in Pacific Time from 9AM to 6PM



Apply only if you can speak a Bilingual Language



If you're ready to use your language skills and heart for service to brighten someone’s day, we’d love to hear from you!

You will also oversee, organize, direct, and manage operations and projects. Your main responsibility will be coordinating office activities, managing projects, and maintaining client relationships. Bids will be prepared by reviewing project plans and specifications and developing accurate cost estimates. The candidate will be responsible for efficiently sourcing, quoting, and estimating projects and inquiries, as well as following up on quotes. This includes handling
s, responding to inquiries, and managing incoming requests.



You will be a key member of a highly professional and dynamic team. The working environment is often demanding, so you must be able to prioritize effectively and maintain a high level of professionalism at all times. Additional tasks may be assigned as needed.



Excellent communication skills are essential, including the ability to effectively communicate across all platforms used within the business. Assignments are highly time-sensitive and must be completed promptly and accurately.

b. It is essential you have good knowledge of all Microsoft packages especially excel

c. Excellent English comprehension and writing ability.

d. Problem solving abilities.

f. Data entry experience is desired.

title: Executive Assistant to the Founder
description:
Forget What You Think an EA Does.



This isn't a role for someone who manages a calendar and waits for instructions. This is a role for someone who sees what needs to happen before they're asked, and makes it happen before anyone notices it was a problem.



We're growing fast. The Founder is deep in client delivery, sales, expansion, and content simultaneously. To keep scaling without losing quality, we need one person who owns the operational and administrative infrastructure around him.

That's you. If you're ready.



***About Growth Dinners***



Growth Dinners operates and runs curated executive dinner experiences for B2B companies across multiple U.S. cities. Our clients are sponsors and hosts who use our dinners to access hard-to-reach buyers, build relationships with C-suite prospects, and accelerate pipeline in a room where business actually gets done.



We're a lean, founder-led operation with high standards, fast decisions, and a bias toward action. Every hire matters here.

What You'll Own



***Event & Dinner Operations***



Coordinate logistics for B2B executive dinners end-to-end — venues, RSVPs, run-of-show, day-of execution, and post-event follow-up

Build and maintain event timelines, checklists, and SOPs that reduce friction and prevent anything from falling through the cracks

Manage contractor communication and vendor coordination before and after each event

Track event deliverables and ensure all client commitments are met on schedule



*** Founder Calendar & Inbox*** 



Own the Founder's calendar — proactively protect high-output time, schedule with intent, and eliminate scheduling back-and-forth

Triage and manage inbox communications — draft responses, flag priorities, and handle routine correspondence independently

Prepare the Founder for every meeting with relevant context, agenda, and background

Follow up on open loops so nothing stalls due to a missed reply

Client Communications & Follow-Up

Draft and manage client-facing communications with professionalism and attention to brand voice

Track client deliverables, deadlines, and milestones across active engagements

Coordinate onboarding touchpoints for new dinner sponsors and ensure a smooth client experience from contract to event day

Send post-event summaries, attribution documentation, and follow-up sequences on behalf of the Founder



*** CRM & Pipeline Management*** 



Keep the CRM clean, updated, and actionable — log activity, update deal stages, and flag stale contacts

Manage outreach sequences and ensure follow-ups are sent on schedule

Build and maintain contact lists for prospective dinner guests and event sponsors

Surface weekly pipeline reports and flag anything that needs the Founder's attention



** Who You Are** 



You're the kind of person who finishes something before being asked twice. You think in systems. You write with clarity. And you take ownership like it's your business — because in many ways, it will be.

You have 3–4 years of experience in an Executive Assistant, Operations Coordinator, or similar role — ideally in a fast-moving startup, agency, or events environment

You're a strong writer who can draft
s, client communications, and follow-ups that sound like a human wrote them. 

Your AI is fluent and up to speed on how to use the latest AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc. to maximize efficiency and productivity. 

You understand basic automation tools like Zapier and Make.com or are excited to jump in and to learn them on your first day.

You have a working knowledge of CRM tools & SOPs databases (HubSpot, Notion, Airtable, or similar) and don't need to be trained from zero. 

You're proactive — you don't wait to be told the same thing twice

You communicate ahead of problems, not after

You've read Buy Back Your Time by Dan Martell or you're ready to — because that's the operating system we run on

You thrive in a remote environment and take ownership of your own structure and accountability



***What Success Looks Like in 30 Days***



The Founder's inbox and calendar are under control — no missed follow-ups, no double-bookings, no surprise deadlines

Every active dinner event has a documented run-of-show and client communication log

The CRM is clean, current, and being used to drive follow-up — not just store data

You've proactively identified and solved at least two recurring operational problems without being asked



***Our Hiring Process***

We move fast and we value your time. Here's exactly what to expect:

1.  Submit a 1-minute Loom video answering: Why are you the right fit for this role? What's a system or process you built that made someone's work life meaningfully easier?

2.  15-minute intro call — quick vibe check on expectations and fit

3.  Short skills assessment — we'll send you a realistic task (paid) to see how you think and execute

4.  Final interview with the Founder

5.  Offer — if we're both excited, we move immediately

Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.

This role is remote, part-time 10 hours per week with ability to grow into full-time role. 

We work together on a paid project, then move to part-time, and finally full-time after you've demonstrated you're a fit. 

To apply, send your Loom video + resume to success@webinarrev.co with subject line: "EA Application — [Your Name]"

description:
Job Summary:





We are seeking a detail-oriented and technically skilled Remote Plumbing MEP CAD/Revit Designer & Drafter to develop accurate and code-compliant shop drawings using Revit and AutoCAD. The role involves coordinating and routing piping systems, resolving complex layout challenges, and collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to ensure seamless integration of HVAC, plumbing, and sprinkler systems. The ideal candidate has a strong understanding of construction principles, experience in MEP shop drawings, and the ability to adapt to client-specific templates and workflows. This position requires excellent communication skills, problem-solving ability, and a proactive, self-motivated approach to delivering high-quality technical documentation with minimal supervision.



Key Responsibilities:



Create detailed shop drawings for MEPF systems using Revit and AutoCAD.

Coordinate and route piping systems efficiently and effectively.

Communicate ideas and solutions for complex routing challenges.

Work with established templates and systems provided by the client.

Collaborate on MEPF system design and documentation.

Adapt to client-specific workflows and methodologies through training.

Perform other tasks related to the position.

Ensure drawings comply with project specifications and codes.

Coordinate with other disciplines to resolve clashes.

Qualifications & Requirements:



Proficient level of English (written and spoken).

Excellent communication skills for coordination and problem-solving.

Strong understanding of construction principles and practices

Background and experience in creating shop drawings for MEP systems

Proficiency in Revit software for MEP applications

Knowledge of HVAC, plumbing, and sprinkler system design

Willingness to learn client-specific templates and systems.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook and Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets.

Out-of-the-box thinker with a reliable, self-motivated, and confident approach; quick learner with a positive attitude.

Out-of-the-box thinker, reliable, self-motivated, confident, and quick learner with a positive attitude.

Sound judgment and the capacity to comprehend and execute instructions promptly with minimal supervision.

title: Integration Specialist
description:
A resume is required to be considered.

Must be available to work U.S. Pacific Standard Time (PST) hours.

The contract will be managed through Deel, and work will be tracked using Hubstaff.



Position Summary



We are seeking an Integration Specialist to maintain and improve the integrations connecting our e-commerce sales channels, ERP, and fulfillment partners. You will act as the first line of defense, monitoring issues, triaging errors, and resolving problems before they impact operations.



What You'll Do



Monitor integrations across e-commerce and ERP systems for errors, failures, and data gaps.

Triage and resolve integration errors, escalating when necessary.

Perform configuration and mapping updates in our iPaaS platform, including sandbox testing and production deployment.

Review reconciliation reports and resolve discrepancies to keep order data accurate.

Identify recurring failure patterns and implement preventative fixes.

Support custom API based integrations and participate in regular team syncs.



What We're Looking For



Must have:



Strong understanding of integrations, including data mapping, field transformations, error handling, and flow logic.

Hands on experience with REST APIs and webhooks; comfortable reading API documentation and debugging requests.

Proven troubleshooting ability; follow records across systems, identify failures, and resolve them.

Ability to manage multiple open issues and prioritize effectively.

Comfortable working independently, documenting work clearly, and communicating with a remote team.



Nice to have:



Experience with an iPaaS platform such as Celigo.

Familiarity with e-commerce platforms or ERP systems.

Experience with sandbox to production deployment workflows.

Basic scripting skills, JavaScript or Python, for debugging or extending integration logic.

title: Accounts Receivable (AR) Manager
description:
A resume is required to be considered.

Must be available to work U.S. Pacific Standard Time (PST) hours.

The contract will be managed through Deel, and work will be tracked using Hubstaff.



Position Summary



The Accounts Receivable Manager owns the end-to-end, multi-channel eCommerce AR function, including sales audit, payment reconciliation, cash application, multi-currency transactions, and sales tax/VAT. This role requires deep experience with eCommerce platforms, high transaction volumes, problem-solving, and team and process development. The AR Manager partners closely with Finance, Operations, and Customer Service to ensure financial accuracy and operational efficiency.



Key Responsibilities



Audit and reconcile sales transactions across Amazon, Shopify, and TikTok Shop; investigate and resolve variances or missing invoices.

Record and reconcile cash receipts across multiple payment platforms (e.g., Amazon, Shopify, Payoneer, PayPal, Stripe), matching gross sales to net payouts and identifying platform fees, commissions, refunds, and chargebacks.

Manage and reconcile accounts receivable and cash clearing accounts; investigate and resolve discrepancies in a timely manner.

Lead the monthly close for Revenue, Cash, and AR, including journal entries, account reconciliations, and revenue recognition; establish and maintain strong documentation and internal controls for audit and compliance.

Monitor inventory in transit and partner with Operations and third-party logistics providers to investigate gross margin variances.

Recommend and implement automation and process improvements to streamline billing and reconciliation workflows.



Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

5+ years of relevant accounting experience, preferably in eCommerce, DTC, or consumer goods.

Strong understanding of GAAP, revenue recognition, and AR best practices.

Hands-on experience reconciling multi-channel sales and payment gateways and analyzing detailed transaction reports from Shopify, TikTok, and Amazon Seller Central.

Experience with ERP systems (NetSuite strongly preferred); involvement in system or process implementations is a plus.

Advanced Excel skills and strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

Proven ability to manage a small AR team in a remote, fast-paced environment.

Excellent communication skills and strong attention to detail.

title: Dating App Manager
description:

Position: Personal Dating App Manager

 hours/day 6 days/week

Seeking a proactive and personable individual to manage my online dating profiles with the goal of finding a compatible girlfriend. WORK WILL BE MONITORED ON TIME DOCTOR

Why you think you'd excel in this role.

title: Pinterest Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY



If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:




/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagIckNnVuKAYhim2/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We’re hiring a Pinterest Manager to take full ownership of our Pinterest presence and turn it into a high-performing sales channel.



This role owns both organic Pinterest growth and Pinterest Ads performance, with a strong focus on turning Pinterest into a scalable paid acquisition channel.



This is not a generic social media role—we’re looking for someone who deeply understands how the Pinterest platform works, from its search algorithm and Smart Feed to pin formats, trends, and conversion paths. Your goal: drive meaningful traffic and sales from Pinterest through smart, strategic execution.



Mission Statement: Build and scale a Pinterest strategy that doesn’t just look good—but performs. You will grow impressions, increase outbound clicks, and **drive profitable revenue through both organic content and paid Pinterest campaigns.



Primary Responsibilities





Pinterest Organic Strategy & Execution



- Develop and execute a Pinterest-specific strategy rooted in platform best practices and SEO.

- Stay on top of Pinterest’s evolving algorithm, features (e.g., Idea Pins, video), and trends to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Use keyword research and SEO to craft high-converting titles, descriptions, and hashtags.

- Align Pinterest strategy with seasonal campaigns, product launches, and key retail 
nts.

- Build and maintain a structured Pinterest keyword library to support ongoing SEO efforts.

- Leverage Pinterest keyword insights to inform both organic content and paid targeting.



Pinterest Ads Strategy & Execution



- Plan, launch, and manage Pinterest ad campaigns to drive traffic, conversions, and revenue.

- Develop a full-funnel Pinterest strategy that integrates organic content and paid amplification.

- Own campaign structure across prospecting, retargeting, and catalog sales campaigns.

- Manage budgets, bids, and pacing to hit performance targets.

- Continuously test audiences, creatives, and campaign types to improve efficiency.

- Partner with the eCommerce and analytics teams to ensure proper tracking and attribution.

- Scale winning campaigns while maintaining target CPA/ROAS goals.



Content Creation & Scheduling



- Design and publish optimized pins (static, video, Idea Pins) that speak to our target customer and drive clicks.

- Build and maintain organized boards with strategic themes and branding.

- Manage publishing cadence based on performance data and best practices through Tailwind, Pinterest Scheduler, or similar tools.

- Ensure all pins are visually on-brand and aligned with HiEnd Accents’ positioning.



Performance Analytics & Optimization



- Track and report on KPIs weekly/monthly: outbound clicks, saves, conversions, CTR.

- Run A/B tests on creative, formats, and timing to improve pin performance.

- Continuously refine strategy based on what the algorithm favors and what drives the best ROI.

- Monitor and optimize for downstrea
trics such as assisted conversions and revenue contribution where available.

- Monitor competitor activity and emerging Pinterest trends within the home and interior space.



Cross-Functional Coordination



- Collaborate with our marketing, design, and eCommerce teams to align Pinterest with overall brand goals.

- Repurpose and adapt content for Pinterest from broader campaigns and launches.

- Identify and surface high-potential UGC or inspiration imagery for Pinterest use.



Requirements



- Have 2+ years of hands-on Pinterest Ads and organic Pinterest experience** for a brand or eCommerce business.

- Demonstrated experience managing Pinterest Ads Manager, including campaign structure, audience targeting, and bid optimization.

- Comfortable working with performance data, dashboards, and attribution reporting.

- Passion for interior design, home décor, or lifestyle brands preferred.

- Experience working with luxury, premium, or design-driven brands is a strong plus.

- Must be able to collaborate during overlapping US business hours as needed.

- Understand how Pinterest works as a visual search engine, not just a social platform.

- Have a strong portfolio or case studies that show you’ve driven real traffic and sales from Pinterest**.

- Are skilled with Pinterest SEO, keyword research, and algorithm-based strategies.

- Know your way around Tailwind, Canva, Photoshop, and Pinterest Analytics.

- Are detail-oriented, self-directed, and results-focused.

- Bonus: experience with affiliate marketing, *
 capture from Pinterest, or using Pinterest for DTC sales.

- Please include links to Pinterest accounts, boards, or case studies you have directly managed.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.

The ideal candidate excels in building relationships, is passionate about social media and interior design, is a strong writer with a keen visual eye, and thrives on performance-driven teams.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Content Development:



- In partnership with our Senior Social Media Manager and Marketing Team, create and maintain a social media content calendar that supports primary brand stories and goals while also tapping into seasonal 
nts and appropriate trends

- Create original, on-brand social media content that our followers will appreciate

- Content will be a mix of product-related content as well as product-adjacent content (e.g., top sleep tips!)

- Leveraging data, identify UGC and inspiration imagery to be considered for posting

- Write effective content. Work with copywriters and designers to ensure content is informative and appealing

- Keep up to date with current news, pausing content and escalating to leadership where appropriate

- Partner with Marketing and eComm tea
mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

- Develop Instagram Stories templates and stickers. Using those templates and Instagram platform elements, create our Instagram Stories



Posting:



- Schedule content for
, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later

- Post Instagram Stories directly from the Instagram app



Affiliate Marketing & Community Management



- Respond to all engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekdays

- Respond to all urgent engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekends

- Respond to engagement during normal US hours (range of acceptable times: 10 pm PH - 9 am PH)

- Author thoughtful, individualized comments and messages in the brand voice in response to comments on our pages, on images where we are tagged or where our product is depicted, and on images posted by brands and people we admire!

- Develop and maintain a live document with common questions and responses

- Adhere to rules and regulations - **no “black hat” social media techniques**! We want to build our brand presence organically



Asset Collection



- Request and gather UGC from our followers and fans in our Airtable database. Request content usage permission for all images that are within our brand guidelines. Follow up via
 or direct message as needed for any assets we are especially eager to share.

- Obtain or verify permissions for any images submitted via direct message,
, influencer collaborations or other means and upload to our visual curation tool, editing beforehand as needed.

- With brand priorities in mind, investigate content leads identified by social media, press, and other means to create a library of aspirational imagery featuring our products



Influencer Marketing



- Identify influencers who we can work with as part of our influencer marketing strategy

- Execute on influencer marketing strategy and management, including cultivating our network of valued influencer partners



Reporting & Strategy



- Assist in regular content performance and competitive reporting and analysis

- Provide ad hoc qualitative social analysis

- Be our in-house expert on social platform updates and trends in social media, interior design, home, and retail, presenting out to the team as needed

- Continuously seek ways to improve processes, recommending any tools or technology needed and subsequently serving as the primary point of contact for the relevant third parties

- Ideate new social activations, such as content series, engagement strategies, contests, and giveaways



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



-Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

-Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to learn, grow and develop their careers continuously

-Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

description:

JOB DESCRIPTION



We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Accounts Payable Specialist to join our close-knit accounting team. In this role, you will be in charge of making sure our company pays all of its bills on time and correctly, including vendors in the U.S. and overseas. If you are great with numbers, organized, and love making sure things are done right the first time, this job is for you.

- Double-check all invoices to ensure accuracy and compliance with company policies.

- Match vendor statements with our records and investigate any mismatches or errors.

- Ensure each expense is booked to the correct account, department, or project.

- Respond to vendor
s and calls professionally and quickly.

title: SEO & AI Search Specialist (GEO/AEO)
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this role feels like the perfect fit and you meet the qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagyn70NlQQGtKUtK/form

---

We’re hiring an SEO & AI Search Specialist to grow organic visibility and revenue across traditional search and AI-driven answer engines. You’ll own strategy and execution for our Shopify stores—
 and 
—covering technical SEO, content, entity/structured data, link acquisition, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)—earning inclusion and citations in Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, Perplexity, and ChatGPT/Gemini.



You’re excited because you will...



Strategy & Ownership

- Build and execute an integrated SEO + GEO roadmap tied to revenue for priority categories (sheet sets, duvet covers, quilts, decorative pillows).

- Define and track a query set for SERPs and AI answers; report share-of-voice and citation/inclusion rate in AI Overviews/answer engines.



On-Site & Technical

- Audit and improve site architecture, internal linking, faceted navigation, canonicals, and crawl budget for Shopify.

- Elevate Core Web Vitals and image optimization for PDPs/PLPs.

- Implement and maintain JSON-LD schema (Product, Offer, Review, Breadcrumb, Organization, FAQ, ImageObject) to strengthen entity understanding.



Content & Entity Building

- Create entity-first, evidence-backed content answer engines trust: buyer’s guides, comparisons, FAQs, care/how-to, sizing explainers, collection hubs.

- Ensure product attribute completeness (materials, thread count, fill, sizes, care, style) so AI systems can recommend or cite our pages.

- Collaborate with brand/editorial to publish on-brand copy optimized for humans and LLMs.



GEO-Specific Initiatives

- Test AI Overview/answer inclusion tactics (structured data, Q&A blocks, citations, author/entity pages, first-party images).

- Monitor and improve brand citation rate in answers for commercial and informational intents.

- Manage AI crawler permissions and robots directives (GPTBot, Perplexity, CommonCrawl) with Engineering/IT.



Off-Site & Authority

- Build a white-hat digital PR/backlink program with home & design publications, blogs, and partner sites.

- Strengthen E-E-A-T signals (author bios, brand story, policies, reviews/UGC, press mentions).



Analytics & Experimentation

- Run experiments; measure impact in GA4 & GSC with dashboards (Looker Studio).

- Prepare periodic reports and present insights and next steps to stakeholders.



90-Day Success

- Baseline audits completed (technical, content, entities, AI answer presence) and a prioritized 6-month roadmap delivered.

- Quick wins shipped: schema fixes, internal linking improvements, attribute completeness for top SKUs/collections, and one entity-driven content hub launched.

- GEO scorecard established (priority queries, inclusion/citation rate, answer snippets captured, supporting pages).



6–12 Month Outcomes

- Material growth in non-brand organic revenue and category rankings.

- Sustained inclusion/citation in AI answers for target queries across core categories.

- Repeatable GEO playbook embedded in content and merchandising workflows.



Job Requirements

- Proven SEO chops in eCommerce (preferably Shopify) with measurable revenue impact.

- Hands-on GEO experience (or a strong POV) optimizing for AI Overviews and answer engines: structuring content for direct answers, citations, and entity confidence.

- Proficiency with Ahrefs/Similar, Google Search Console, GA4, and Shopify; comfort with HTML/Liquid basics and JSON-LD.

- Ability to plan and execute on-brand digital PR/backlink programs.

- Strong analytical skills; can turn data into decisions and roadmaps.

- Excellent English writing/editing skills (you can own outreach and on-site copy).

- High ownership, bias to action, and communication via
, Slack, Zoom, and phone.

- Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent experience).

- Belief in our company mission and embodiment of our values.



Nice to have

- Experience with product feeds (Google Merchant Center), reviews/UGC integration, and PDP/PLP template optimization.

- Familiarity with log-file analysis, bot identification, and AI crawler management.

- Comfort building dashboards in Looker Studio or similar.



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding, linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate customers' lives through beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.

title: Executive & Personal Assistant to Founder
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and adaptable Remote Executive Assistant to support the founder of a fast-growing fitness brand, MOOV Seattle.



This role is ideal for someone who thrives behind the scenes—managing details, organizing chaos, and keeping things running smoothly from afar.



?



About the Role



This is not a slow or overly structured role.



Things move quickly. Priorities shift. Some days are clear and planned, others are fast-paced and evolving. We’re looking for someone who can stay calm, think ahead, and bring structure to a slightly chaotic (but exciting) environment.



You will act as a right hand remotely, helping manage communication, scheduling, and digital organization.



?



Key Responsibilities



???? Inbox + Communication Management (Primary Focus)

 • Clean, organize, and maintain inbox daily

 • Draft and respond to
s in the founder’s voice

 • Flag urgent vs. non-urgent items

 • Unsubscribe, archive, and create systems for inbox efficiency



?



???? Calendar + Scheduling

 • Manage and optimize calendar across business + personal life

 • Schedule meetings, appointments, and commitments

 • Coordinate across multiple parties and time zones

 • Help prevent overbooking and create realistic schedules

 • Build in buffer time and protect focus time



?



????? Organization + Admin Systems

 • Organize Google Drive, documents, and files

 • Create systems for tracking tasks, deadlines, and projects

 • Manage to-do lists and follow-ups

 • Keep everything centralized and easy to access



?



???? Light Admin + Financial Tasks

 • Track bills, subscriptions, and due dates

 • Assist with basic expense tracking

 • Help organize receipts and simple financial records



?



??????? Business Support (MOOV)

 • Assist with small admin tasks for the studio

 • Help coordinate events, schedules, or team communication

 • Support leadership team with light organizational needs



?



???? Coordination (Remote)

 • Order groceries or supplies for delivery

 • Coordinate services (cleaners, maintenance, etc.)

 • Book travel, reservations, and appointments



?



Who You Are

 • Extremely organized and detail-oriented

 • Proactive—you anticipate needs before being asked

 • Comfortable working in a fast-paced, sometimes chaotic environment

 • Able to pivot quickly and adjust priorities without stress

 • Strong written communicator (able to match tone/voice)

 • Tech-savvy (Gmail, Google Calendar, docs, task managers, etc.)

 • Reliable, responsive, and takes ownership of tasks

 • Comfortable working remotely and independently



?



Bonus If You:

 • Have experience supporting founders or entrepreneurs

 • Love building systems and organizing workflows

 • Enjoy optimizing schedules and workflows

 • Have worked across different time zones



?



Details

 • Location: Remote (outside the U.S. welcome)

 • Hours: Part-time to start (with opportunity to grow)

 • Compensation: Based on experience and location

 • Must have reliable internet and availability for daily communication



?



Why This Role is Unique



You’ll be working closely with a founder who is building something meaningful and fast-growing. This role will evolve over time, with opportunities to take on more responsibility as the business expands.

title: Instagram Video Editor. Long-Term Role, Real Team, Real Growth
description:
Location: Remote

Pay: Up to $10/hr with a direct path to full-time within 2–3 months

No Agencies. Individual Applicants Only. Do Not Apply If This Is Not You.





Before You Apply Read This First



This is not an entry level role. We move fast because we're growing fast, and we need someone who can keep up without being managed closely.



We're not just hiring for skill. We're hiring for who you are.



We value honesty, hard work, and people who are always pushing to be better in their craft and in their life. If that's not you, this isn't the right place. If it is, you'll fit right in and you'll want to stay. Most people who join our team do.



Who We Are

We're a marketing and content company managing multiple clients on Instagram. We produce high volumes of short form content and we hold our work to a high standard. Our team supports each other, communicates openly, and shows up consistently.



We also believe in taking care of our people. Paid vacation and bonuses are part of working here, regardless of where in the world you are.



Who We're Looking For

An experienced video editor who lives on Instagram. Not someone who uses it... someone who studies it. You know what's performing, why it's performing, and how to replicate it for different brands and audiences.



You think like a content strategist and execute like a pro. You don't wait to be told what's trending because you already know.



Your editing should look and feel like these 
 
 
 
 
 
 



If you don't follow accounts like these and actively study them, this role is not for you.



What You'll Be Doing

- Editing short form Reels for multiple clients

- Bringing trend and content ideas to the team proactively

- Handling transcriptions and subtitles with accuracy

- Delivering on time, every time. NO chasing required

- Flagging when something won't perform and knowing why



What You Need



- Proven experience editing short-form content — this is not the place to learn

- A real understanding of Instagram: the algorithm, trends, and what stops the scroll

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve — CapCut is an automatic disqualification

- Strong animation and motion graphics skills — do not apply if you cannot do this

- Knowledge of audio editing — compression, EQ, and clean levels are expected, not optional

- Color correction and color grading experience

- Solid English for transcriptions and subtitles — accuracy matters. We cannot waste time fixing typos.

- Ability to handle multiple clients and projects simultaneously without dropping the ball

- Ability to hit deadlines without being followed up on

- Honest, direct communication — we'd rather hear a hard truth than a comfortable excuse



The Opportunity



This starts as a part-time contract at up to $10/hr based on experience, with a probation period during the first 2–3 months.



If you're the right person we will bring you on full time. We're not afraid to invest in people who earn it. Beyond that, you can expect paid vacation, performance bonuses, and a team that genuinely supports your growth.



People who join us tend to stay. That tells you something.



How to Apply: We don't hire on resumes alone. You need to show us you can edit.



1. Download the sample assets from 

2. Edit a short-form Reel using one of these assets.

3. Touch the audio — compression, EQ, and levels all matter

4. Submit your resume, portfolio, and edited test video

5. Include a short note on why you're the right fit. Start it with the word "Reels" so we know you read this



Applications without the test edit will not be reviewed. No exceptions.

title: Photo QC Specialist – Real Estate Media (Remote)
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Photo QC Specialist – Real Estate Media (Remote)



About Us:

Carlson Home Photography is a premium real estate media company based in Kansas City. We serve residential real estate agents and builders across the KC metro with high-end photography, video, drone, and 3D tour services. Quality is everything to us - our reputation is built on delivering polished, consistent media that makes our clients look great every single time.

We're growing and need a detail-obsessed QC specialist to be the last set of eyes before our work reaches clients.



About the Role:

This is a precision quality control and delivery role - not a creative editing role. You will review incoming photo batches from our editing team each morning, apply corrections where needed, and deliver finished packages to clients through our delivery platform on a tight morning deadline.



Your eye and your standard become our brand standard. That's how seriously we take this role.

To start, you'll be handling QC and delivery for the Company Owner's personal shoots (2-3 projects per weekday, Tuesday through Friday). As you demonstrate consistency and build speed, your hours and responsibilities will grow to include additional photographers on our team. Strong performance is the clearest path to more hours.



What You'll Do:

-Review incoming photo batches each morning and identify any issues before delivery

-Correct white balance and color inconsistencies - especially across multiple angles of the same room

-Straighten horizontals and verticals with precision

-Perform object removal and touch-ups using Photoshop AI tools

-Deliver completed packages through HDPhotohub according to our SOPs

-Flag any projects that require extended turnaround

-Log correction types by project to help us track quality patterns over time



Your Schedule:

This role requires availability Tuesday through Friday from 7:00am to 9:00am U.S. Central Time. Edited photos arrive in our inbox by 6:00am CST and need to be QC'd and delivered within that morning window. Reliability and punctuality on this schedule is non-negotiable - our clients expect their media on time, every time.



What We're Looking For:



-Strong hands-on proficiency in Lightroom CC and Photoshop - you will be tested on this before being hired

-Proficiency with Photoshop AI tools including Photoshop Beta - experience with AI-powered object removal and generative fill is a significant advantage

-Sharp eye for color consistency, exposure balance, and geometric correction

-Solid understanding of what high-quality real estate photography looks like at a premium level

-Experience in real estate photography editing specifically - general photo editing experience alone is not enough

-HDPhotohub experience is a plus but not required - we will train the right person

-Detail-oriented to a fault - this role will expose every shortcut you are tempted to take

-Reliable, self-directed, and able to hit deadlines without being followed up on

-Strong written English for clear communication with our team

-Active Adobe Creative Cloud subscription with access to Photoshop Beta





Hours and Compensation:



Starting hours: 7:00am - 9:00am CST, Tuesday through Friday (approximately 8 hours per week to start)

Pay rate: $6.00 per hour

Hours will grow directly with performance - strong, consistent work is how you earn more

This is a long-term part-time position with real growth potential as our team expands





How to Apply:

Send your application to 
 and include the following:



-Begin your application with your favorite color

-A brief introduction covering who you are and your specific background in real estate media

title: Social Media, Digital Marketing, Website, and IT Support for Mental Health and Wellness Practice
description:
Virtual Assistant – Social Media, Marketing, Website Management, and IT Support (Philippines-Based)

Job Title: Virtual Assistant – Social Media, Digital Marketing, Website, and IT Support for Mental Health and Wellness Practice

Location: Remote (Philippines-based, supporting a U.S.-based clinic in Alaska)



Position Type: Full-Time or Part-Time (Flexible, with preference for consistent availability during U.S. Alaska Time Zone business hours)



About Us?We are a private mental health and family wellness practice located in Palmer, Alaska. We provide comprehensive services, including psychiatric care, medication management (including controlled substances), transcranial magnetic stimulation (TMS), Spravato (esketamine) treatments, weight loss management, hormone therapy, and peptide programs. As a small, independent practice without federal funding, we prioritize high-quality, patient-centered care while maintaining financial sustainability and growing our community presence.

We are seeking a skilled and creative virtual assistant to manage our online presence, digital marketing efforts, website, integrations, and basic IT support. This role is essential in helping us expand reach, engage patients, and streamline digital operations.



Key Responsibilities

 • Manage and grow social media accounts (e.g., Instagram,
, X/Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok) including content creation, scheduling posts, community engagement, and performance analytics.

 • Develop and execute digital marketing strategies, including
 campaigns, content marketing, SEO optimization, and paid advertising (e.g., Google Ads, social media ads).

 • Maintain and update the practice website (e.g., using WordPress or similar CMS), including content updates, basic design improvements, and ensuring mobile responsiveness and accessibility.

 • Handle technical integrations, such as connecting tools (CRM,
 platforms, scheduling software, payment gateways) and automating workflows.

 • Provide basic IT support, including troubleshooting software issues, managing cloud tools (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365), and ensuring secure data handling in compliance with HIPAA guidelines.

 • Create engaging content (graphics, videos, blogs) aligned with mental health and wellness themes, while maintaining sensitivity and professionalism.

 • Monitor online reputation, respond to reviews, and track marketing ROI.

Requirements

 • Proven experience as a virtual assistant or specialist in social media management, digital marketing, website administration, and IT support (minimum 2-3 years preferred).

 • Proficiency with social media platforms and tools (e.g., Hootsuite, Buffer, Canva, Meta Business Suite).

 • Strong knowledge of website management (WordPress, basic HTML/CSS, SEO tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, or Yoast).

 • Experience with digital marketing 
 platforms like Mailchimp, ad platforms, content strategy) and technical integrations (Zapier, APIs, CRM systems).

 • Basic IT troubleshooting skills and familiarity with HIPAA-compliant practices for handling sensitive health-related content.

 • Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) with a professional, empathetic, and creative tone suitable for healthcare audiences.

 • Reliable high-speed internet, quiet workspace, and availability to overlap with U.S. Alaska Time Zone business hours.

 • Proficiency in tools such as Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, graphic design software (Canva, Adobe Suite basics), and analytics platforms.

 • Understanding of Meta’s Andromeda (the AI-driven advertising retrieval engine that powers personalized ad delivery on Meta platforms such as
 and Instagram).

Preferred Qualifications

 • Experience in marketing for healthcare, mental health, or wellness practices, with an understanding of sensitive topics and regulatory guidelines.

 • Portfolio of previous social media campaigns, website projects, or marketing results.

 • Self-motivated, organized, proactive, and able to work independently with strong problem-solving skills.

Compensation and Benefits

 • Competitive hourly rate based on experience (to be discussed during interview; industry standard for specialized digital marketing and IT VAs).

 • Flexible scheduling with potential for long-term growth.

 • Opportunity to contribute creatively to a meaningful practice supporting mental health and wellness in the community.



How to Apply?Please submit your resume, a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience in social media, marketing, website management, integrations, and IT support (including any knowledge of Meta’s Andromeda), along with links to your portfolio or examples of previous work (e.g., social media accounts managed, websites built/updated, marketing campaigns). Include any references.



In your application, briefly describe your experience with digital tools for healthcare or wellness brands and any specific achievements in growing online presence.

We look forward to reviewing applications from qualified candidates who are passionate about digital growth and supporting patient-centered initiatives.



Please be active in your messages.



Thank you for your interest.

title: Bookkeeper/ CPA
description:
Company Overview:



We are a US-landscape company with real estate holdings.



We are seeking a dedicated, experienced Filipino virtual professional to fully own the bookkeeping across these entities.



This full-time role combines hands-on bookkeeping with accountant-level oversight and CFO-minded strategic support.



You will ensure books are accurate, CPA-ready, and provide actionable financial insights for decision-making. The role requires strong independence, professional judgment, and full accountability. Prior experience with US-based or multi-entity businesses is highly valued.



Important: Availability during Pacific Time Zone (PST/PDT) business hours is required for real-time collaboration, follow-ups, and alignment with US operations.



Key Responsibilities:



Daily and Operational Accounting:



Enter and code receipts, bills, checks, debits, and credits into QuickBooks Desktop (QBD) and Aspire (once implemented), with correct class, customer, and job classifications.

Perform daily reconciliations with vendor bills, statements, bank/credit card accounts for accuracy.

Manage full Accounts Payable (A/P) and Accounts Receivable (A/R): run reports, process payments per SOPs, handle credit memos and applications.

Organize and file receipts digitally.

Follow up promptly with personnel on incomplete or uncoded items.

Review, post, and reconcile bank/credit card transactions daily and monthly.

Manage clearing accounts, timing differences, owner distributions, and equity transactions.



Month-End and Financial Close:



Prepare and post journal entries (accruals, depreciation, reclassifications, corrections, equity adjustments).

Generate, review, and stand behind monthly financial statements (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet) – clean, consistent, and defensible.

Close books accurately within two weeks of month-end.

Maintain fixed asset and depreciation schedules per CPA.

Proactively identify, investigate, and correct errors or misclassifications.



Compliance, Controls, and Tax Support:



Implement and enforce robust accounting controls and review processes.

Keep books audit-ready, consistent month-over-month, and fully prepared for CPA/tax reviews.

Prepare data for tax compliance (sales tax, payroll tax, etc.) and support CPA with annual filings, year-end reviews, or inquiries.

Flag risks, inconsistencies, or structural issues early.



Strategic Financial Oversight and Advisory:



Oversee budgeting, forecasting, and tracking systems (including Google Sheets controls).

Reconcile QuickBooks with external tools (budget sheets, CRM, etc.) monthly and explain variances.

Deliver insights on cash flow, cost control, and operational decisions.

Recommend process, reporting, or structural improvements as businesses grow.

Act as go-to expert for financial questions, making informed judgment calls and explaining impacts clearly.



Additional:



Support smooth transition to Aspire software.

Collaborate across entities, prioritizing GLAD while giving equal attention to real estate.



Who We're Looking For:



A seasoned professional who is not just a bookkeeper, but thinks like an Accountant/CFO—not just a task executor. You own the financial function end-to-end with confidence.



Must-Have Qualifications:



Proven Accounting Manager with full book ownership.

Extensive hands-on QuickBooks Desktop expertise (reconciliations, journal entries, A/P-A/R, equity, CPA-ready financials).

Proficiency with Google Sheets for controls/reporting.

Experience in service-based, real estate, or multi-entity environments preferred.

Strong independent judgment, accountability, and proactive mindset.

Excellent English (written/verbal) for clear communication.

Philippines-based with reliable internet and back-up computers/generators



Preferred:



Familiarity with Aspire or similar industry software.

US client or multi-business experience.



Time Commitment and Compensation:



Full-time- Must align with Pacific Time Zone business hours for meetings, follow-ups, and real-time collaboration—typically 8 AM–5 PM PST/PDT availability required).

Outcomes-focused: accuracy, ownership, and timeliness

Long-term role with growth potential as businesses expand.

Competitive monthly salary in PHP (please state your expected rate in your application).



What's Important to Us:



Accuracy + efficiency.

True ownership and proactive accountability.

Independent operation with sound judgment.

Month-to-month consistency.

Professional, clear communication.



How to Apply:



To show attention to detail, follow this format exactly.



Subject Line: Full-Time Virtual Accountant / Controller Application – Your Full Name



 Body / Application (include all):



Brief video introduction (2–3 minutes max) covering:

Your Bookkeeper/Accountant/CFO-level experience.

Years hands-on with QuickBooks Desktop.

Types of companies/businesses you've managed finances for.

Resume (PDF).

Cover letter: Why you're ideal for this combined role, confirmation of Pacific Time Zone availability, and your expected monthly salary in PHP.



We look forward to hearing from strong candidates ready to own this important function!
