title: Experienced Full-time Associate Site Merchandiser for ecommerce company
description:
Our US-based ecommerce company is looking for a very experienced and excellent Associate Site Merchandiser who is hard-working, very detail-oriented, analytical, organized, with several years of experience in ecommerce. 



It is a FULL-time position (40h/week). This is NOT an entry-level role. 



The Associate Site Merchandiser is responsible for ensuring the product assortment across our brands is populated with the appropriate selling attributes; collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to define new assortment strategies, test new product categories, and report on performance. This role offers an exciting opportunity to work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment and contribute to the success of a high growth business.



Omni Retail Enterprises operates a lifestyle portfolio of digital storefronts and communities including home decor, apparel, collectables, fitness, and more, with millions of consumers around the globe. 



Skills & Qualifications:



• Strong English proficiency, both written and spoken. 

• 1-3 years of experience in online merchandising. 

• High attention to detail, process oriented, strong project management, analytical, problem solving and verbal/written communication skills. 



Experience in Platforms:



• Proficient in Shopify, Google Analytics, and Excel. 

• Familiar with Content Management systems.



Work Schedule:



• Full-time position (40h/week)

• US work hours (CST)



Key Responsibilities:



• Support the day-to-day management, merchandising and revenue growth of our brands with an emphasis on site productivity, sales growth and conversion. A primary focus of this role is the optimization of the online merchandising strategy to ensure that the right product is in the right place and at the right time. Work with our team in the planning of weekly and monthly product placements and product stories.



• Efficiently on-board new SKUs from our vendor partners, placing those SKUs in the proper categories, adding selling attributes, enriching meta data, and building SEO on-page copy. 



• Assist in the development and help maintain the online merchandising and related item strategies to drive sales, conversion rate and overall profitability for the site. Utilize relevant reporting and analysis to communicate online business trends and SKU level performance. Conduct and provide regular competitive analysis to identify best practices and recommend action steps.



• Effectively merchandise products within the product category structure in an effort to influence conversion rate and sales. Utilize all available data points (consumer demand, product inventory, product margin, shipping damage rates, etc.) in an effort to drive profitability for the ecommerce channel. This will include upselling, cross selling, catalog structure management, and creation of product specific landing pages.



• Partner with the team for SEO to positively affect conversion rate and sales through search results. Review customer search behavior to gain an understanding of keyword queries and manipulate the products within the search results page in a manner that drives overall profitability for the ecommerce channel.



• Coordinate with Marketing team to gain a full understanding of all content 
, social, display, search, digital integrations, etc.) potentially driving traffic back to the sites. Merchandise landing pages in a manner that supports the various marketing mediums while keeping profitability of the ecommerce channel top of mind. 



Resume



Please submit your information and resume detailing your relevant experience, skill set, and why you're the perfect fit for this position. Link to submit this information: 



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Administrative — Executive Support & Operations Zunex Pest Control
description:
Zunex Pest Control is a fast-growing, family-owned pest control company operating across Utah and Washington. We're looking for an exceptionally organized, proactive, and detail-driven Administrative VA with a minimum of 2 years of professional administrative experience to work directly alongside our leadership team as a true operational support partner.

This is not an entry-level role and we are not in a position to train foundational administrative skills. We need someone who has already operated independently in a professional environment, knows how to manage competing priorities without being directed, and takes genuine ownership of the systems and tasks in their care.



You'll have real visibility into how the business runs — financials, payroll, systems, processes, and team accountability. The right person will eventually become an indispensable part of how leadership operates day to day, with a clear path toward taking on more ownership and responsibility as the company grows.



If you're someone who notices what others miss, takes pride in keeping things airtight, and wants to grow with a company that will invest in you — this role was built for you.



What You'll Own

Financial Tracking & Payroll Support

Update monthly trackers using QuickBooks data (training provided on our specific workflows). 

Review expenses and flag anything unusual or unclear before it becomes a problem. 

Process and double-check payroll through Paylocity. 

Organize and track invoices and payments.



Data & Systems Organization



Maintain and update Google Sheets, dashboards, and internal trackers. 

Pull reports from FieldRoutes and other systems (training provided). 

Keep Google Drive files, folders, and documents organized and immediately accessible. 

Ensure critical documents are ready to send at a 
nt's notice.



Administrative & Leadership Support



Handle day-to-day administrative requests with speed and accuracy. 

Follow up with tea
mbers to keep information and tasks moving forward. 

Provide daily updates and weekly summaries directly to leadership. 

Manage communications that require documents, approvals, or information. 

Communicate on behalf of leadership when needed — professionalism and strong written English are non-negotiable here.



Process Documentation & Improvement



Build and maintain SOPs and internal process documents. Use tools like ChatGPT to assist in writing and refining processes. Proactively identify gaps in organization and bring solutions, not just observations.



Monitoring & Accountability Support



Check in on key operational areas to ensure nothing falls through the cracks. Help track metrics and ensure systems stay current and accurate. Assist in building audit and accountability systems over time.



What We're Looking For



Required: Minimum 2 years of experience in an administrative, executive assistant, or operations support role. Google Workspace proficiency — Sheets, Drive, Docs, Forms, Calendar, Gmail. Strong written English at a professional level — you will be communicating on behalf of leadership. Proven ability to manage multiple tasks and systems simultaneously without constant direction. Extremely detail-oriented — you catch things before they become problems and you can give a specific example of a time you did. Proactive and self-directed — you identify what needs attention and handle it. Emotionally steady and reliable — leadership needs to trust you completely and consistently.



Preferred but trainable on our specific systems: Experience with FieldRoutes (strong advantage). Familiarity with Paylocity, QuickBooks, or 
. Previous experience supporting a business owner or executive directly.



What We Offer

$1,200–$1,700/month starting based on experience. Performance-based raises and bonuses. End-of-year bonus based on overall contribution. 13th month pay. PTO accrual beginning day one, accessible after 90-day probation. 5 self-selected paid holidays per year — US or Filipino, your choice. Full training on all internal company systems and workflows. Direct access to and communication with ownership. A stable, long-term role with a company that promotes from within.



Please follow these instructions carefully. Attention to detail starts here — applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Use the subject line: Organized Admin VA [Your Name]

In your message, include a short paragraph covering two things: your experience with Google Sheets and administrative organization, and to make sure you are paying attention begin your message by telling us your favorite snack :-) and finally

attach your resume.



Career Ceiling



This role has a genuine path upward. As you demonstrate reliability and grow your understanding of the business, you'll be considered for expanded responsibility in operations, HR support, and direct leadership assistance. Our goal is to find someone who wants to build something with us long term — not just fill a seat.

title: Appointment Setter (No Sales, Friendly Calls + Discord)
description:
HOURS 10AM EST to 8PM EST STANDARD TIME

If you can not do these hours, do not apply!



Read carefully before applying:

This role requires daily social outreach inside 
 communities, voice calls, detailed Google Sheet tracking, and consistent follow-up across 300+ active relationships. This is not a passive VA role.





We are hiring a highly fluent English speaker to build relationships and generate qualified leads through 
, voice calls, and structured follow-ups.



This is NOT a hard sales role.

You are NOT closing deals.

You are also NOT cold messaging strangers.



This is a high-activity, structured role for someone who is charismatic, highly organized, and consistent.



------------------------

WHAT YOU WILL ACTUALLY DO

------------------------



1. Join active 
 communities

- Be active in public chat

- Engage naturally in conversations

- Become someone people want to talk to

- Build familiarity and trust inside the community



2. Get people to come to you

- Your job is NOT to cold DM random people

- Instead, you will communicate well in public chats so people want to message you, reply to you, and build a connection with you

- You may also continue conversations with people who are already warm and responsive



3. Build real relationships

- Add people as friends when appropriate

- Continue conversations in DMs only when natural

- Make people feel comfortable, understood, and interested in talking more

- Your goal is to make people like you and trust you



4. Get on voice calls

- Speak with prospects casually

- These are not aggressive sales calls

- Ask questions, build rapport, and understand their goals

- Help them feel comfortable enough to take the next step



5. Guide qualified people forward

- Naturally guide interested people toward our program

- Move serious people to the next step

- Get qualified people into our 
/system

- Encourage them to complete an application if they are a fit



6. Track and follow up at high volume

- You will manage 300+ active relationships/leads at once

- Every person must be tracked in a Google Sheet

- You will log notes, status, last contact date, and next follow-up date

- Consistent follow-up is a major part of this role

- This is detailed, repetitive work and must be done properly



------------------------

IMPORTANT: THIS ROLE IS HIGH VOLUME

------------------------



- You will be talking to many people every day

- You will manage hundreds of ongoing conversations

- You must stay organized and follow up consistently

- This is not passive work

- This is not a casual chatting role

- This is not a role for someone who avoids structure



If you do not like repetition, detailed tracking, follow-up work, or managing a large number of relationships, this role is not for you.



------------------------

COMPENSATION

------------------------



This role pays:

- A small hourly base

- Plus performance pay per lead / qualified result



This is not a large fixed salary role.

The upside comes from performance.



Example:

One current tea
mber is earning around $1,460 USD/month through lead-based performance.



The better you perform, the more you can earn.



------------------------

YOU ARE A GOOD FIT IF:

------------------------



- Your English is extremely clear and natural

- You are easy to understand on calls

- You are charismatic and know how to make friends quickly

- You are comfortable in 
 communities

- You are comfortable getting on calls

- You can handle high-volume follow-up work

- You are organized and consistent

- You can manage a Google Sheet every day without losing track of people



------------------------

YOU ARE NOT A GOOD FIT IF:

------------------------



- You want to cold message strangers

- You avoid calls

- You prefer low-effort chat support work

- You dislike repetitive follow-ups

- You are disorganized

- You cannot manage many conversations at once

- Your English is not strong enough for natural conversation



------------------------

NOT REQUIRED

------------------------



- Sales experience

- Closing experience



We care more about:

- communication

- charisma

- consistency

- organization

- follow-through



------------------------

TO APPLY, YOU MUST SEND:

------------------------



1. A 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself

2. A 2-minute mock call:

   “You are meeting someone new and building rapport”

3. A screenshot of your internet speed

4. A short written answer:

   “How would you get people in a 
 community to want to talk to you without cold DMing them?”



Applications without these will be ignored.

title: Executive Assistant / Virtual Receptionist
description:
Executive Assistant to the CEO & After-Hours Client Support Specialist

Full-Time | Remote (Philippines-Based) | Long-Term Growth Opportunity



About Hawaii Coastal Property Management

Hawaii Coastal Property Management (HCPM) is a licensed, full-service property management firm based in Honolulu, Hawaii. We manage a diverse portfolio across Oahu spanning long-term residential rentals, mid-term corporate housing, short-term vacation rentals, commercial properties, and HOA/site management contracts. Our CEO is a U.S. Navy veteran, licensed Principal Broker, NARPM Hawaii Chapter board member, and published industry thought leader. HCPM operates on a modern technology stack including AppFolio, Hostaway, and PriceLabs, and we are deeply committed to leveraging AI and automation to deliver exceptional service.



We are growing rapidly and looking for a sharp, driven, and reliable professional to serve as the CEO's executive right hand. This is not a task-runner position — we need a true partner who can think ahead, take ownership, and help drive the business forward.



You will serve as the primary Executive Assistant to our CEO, becoming his virtual right hand. You will manage his communications, calendar, priorities, and workflow — anticipating needs before they arise. Secondarily, you will provide after-hours phone support for HCPM clients and tenants, covering our evening hours after our daytime receptionist signs off.

This role has real long-term growth potential within our company. We are not looking for someone temporary — we want a serious professional who wants to build something meaningful with us.



Schedule & Work Hours



Days: Tuesday through Saturday

Primary Hours: 7:00 AM – 4:00 PM Philippines Time (PHT)

Hawaii Equivalent: M-F 1:00 PM – 10:00 PM Hawaii Standard Time (HST)

On-Call: Some weekend/evening availability for urgent matters

Location: Remote – Philippines-based



Primary Responsibilities – Executive Assistance (85%)



 Management & Triage: Monitor, organize, prioritize, draft responses, and manage the CEO's inbox. Flag urgent items, handle routine correspondence independently, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

Calendar & Schedule Management: Coordinate meetings, appointments, and deadlines. Proactively manage scheduling conflicts and ensure the CEO's time is optimized.

Communication Drafting: Prepare professional
s, memos, proposals, client communications, and follow-ups on behalf of the CEO — including bilingual communications when needed.

Task & Project Coordination: Track action items, follow up with tea
mbers and vendors, maintain project timelines, and ensure deliverables are completed on schedule.

AI-Powered Productivity: Heavily leverage AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, and others) to draft documents, research topics, analyze data, summarize information, and accelerate workflow. You should be fluent and creative in using AI as a daily work multiplier.

Research & Analysis: Conduct market research, competitive analysis, vendor comparisons, regulatory research, and compile findings into clear executive summaries.

Document Preparation: Create and format professional documents, presentations, spreadsheets, reports, and business correspondence.

CRM & Database Support: Assist with contact management, lead tracking, and data entry in AppFolio, LeadSimple, and other platforms as needed.

Confidential & Sensitive Matters: Handle sensitive business information, client records, financial data, and personnel matters with absolute discretion.

Anticipatory Support: Think ahead. Identify what the CEO needs before he asks. Proactively surface reminders, prep materials for meetings, flag upcoming deadlines, and keep the operation running smoothly.



Secondary Responsibilities – After-Hours Phone Support (15%)



Answer incoming calls for HCPM during evening hours (after 5:00 PM HST) when our daytime receptionist signs off for the day.

Serve as a professional, warm, and knowledgeable first point of contact for tenants, owners, vendors, and prospective clients.

Triage calls appropriately: handle routine inquiries, take messages, escalate emergencies, and route calls to the appropriate tea
mber.

Log all calls and messages accurately in our systems for next-day follow-up.

Provide basic property management information and support to callers, including maintenance request intake and general FAQs.



Required Qualifications



Minimum 2–3 years of experience as an Executive Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or similar high-level administrative support role.

Exceptional written and spoken English — professional, polished, and clear. You will represent the CEO externally.

Strong proficiency with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) and a demonstrated ability to use AI creatively for research, drafting, analysis, and task automation.

Highly organized with strong attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously.

Professional phone manner with excellent customer service skills.  ***Roosters crowing in the background is explicitly prohibited.  If you are unable to meet this requirement, please do not apply.***

Tech-savvy: comfortable learning and navigating new software platforms quickly (AppFolio, Hostaway, Google Workspace, Slack, Canva, etc.).

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace with proper equipment for handling phone calls.

Self-starter mentality: you take ownership, solve problems proactively, and do not wait to be told what to do.

Trustworthy and discreet — able to handle confidential business, financial, and personnel information.

Available and dependable during scheduled hours (Tuesday–Saturday, 7 AM–4 PM PHT) with flexibility for occasional urgent needs outside those hours.



Preferred (Not Required)



Property management experience or familiarity with real estate operations.

Experience with AppFolio, Hostaway, PriceLabs, LeadSimple, or similar property management platforms.

Familiarity with Hawaii's real estate market, landlord-tenant laws, or vacation rental regulations.

Experience supporting a CEO, Broker, or business owner in a small-to-mid-size company.

Bilingual abilities (Korean, Japanese, or Tagalog a plus).

Experience with social media management, content creation, or newsletter production.



What We Offer



A meaningful, long-term role with a growing company — not a short-term gig.

Direct partnership with the CEO: you will be his primary right hand and trusted confidant.

Real career growth potential as HCPM expands across residential, commercial, and HOA management.

Exposure to AI-forward business operations — we actively invest in AI tools and expect you to grow with them.

A supportive, professional, and mission-driven team culture rooted in service, integrity, and excellence.

Competitive compensation commensurate with experience (details discussed during interview).

Paid holidays and time-off benefits (details discussed during interview).



How to Apply

Submit your application with the following:



Your updated resume/CV.

A brief cover letter and video introduction, explaining why you are the right fit for this role and what excites you about it.  Please share your experience as an Executive Assistant in your video.

A short writing sample or example of professional correspondence you have drafted.

Your experience with AI tools: share specific examples of how you have used AI in a professional context.



Applications without a cover letter or AI experience examples will not be considered.

title: SUPPLY CHAIN MANAGER (SHOPIFY / DROPSHIPPING FASHION)
description:
Read this carefully.



If you’re looking for an easy “check the boxes and go home” job, this is not for you.



But if you:



Take pride in solving problems fast



Stay organized under pressure



Communicate clearly and professionally



Love making systems run smoothly behind the scenes



Then keep reading.



ROLE: SUPPLY CHAIN MANAGER



You’ll be responsible for making sure every product moves smoothly from our supplier in China to our customers in Europe.



Your mission: ensure orders get delivered — fast, efficiently, and without excuses.



This means you’ll:



-Oversee daily order flow and fulfillment from supplier to customer



-Communicate with suppliers, management, and customer service



-Review and resolve tickets from the issue sheet (incoming CS requests)



-Track orders to detect shipping delays before customers complain



-Update and close issues efficiently — no loose ends



-Help improve SOPs, tracking sheets, and reporting



-Anticipate problems and prevent them before they escalate



At first, you’ll manage this directly.

Over time, you’ll lead the backend logistics team as we scale.





REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVES)



You must have:



-4+ years of experience in supply chain, logistics, or operations



-Experience working with Shopify stores (required)



-Strong understanding of the dropshipping model



-Experience using:



-ParcelPanel or similar tracking tools



-Google Sheets (daily reporting & issue tracking)



-Slack for supplier and internal team communication



-Excellent problem-solving and communication skills



-Experience creating and maintaining SOPs



-Leadership skills — you can manage tasks, people, and deadlines



-Professional written English



-Bonus: Experience in fashion products or e-commerce apparel





WHO YOU ARE



You are:



-A builder, not just a follower



-Organized — you track every moving piece until it’s done



-Fast and reliable — you get answers and make decisions quickly



-Proactive — you don’t wait for problems, you prevent them



-A leader — you think like an owner, not an employee



You understand that good logistics = happy customers = higher profit.

And you take that seriously.





COMPENSATION & HOURS



$6/hour



~30 hours/week (Monday to Saturday)



Long-term position with opportunities to grow into a full leadership role



You’ll work closely with management and the customer service team — the core of our operation.





HOW TO APPLY



If you’re serious, fill out the application form below: 



APPLICATION FORM: 



You’ll be asked to share:



Experience background



Example of supply chain workflows you’ve managed



Tools you’ve used



Situational responses to test problem-solving



IMPORTANT

Your answers must be written by you — no AI, no copy-paste.

If your responses sound generic, your application will be rejected.



To confirm you read this post fully, type Hero when asked in the form.

title: Media Buyer
description:
Part-Time Freelance Meta Ads Manager & Growth Strategist



About Us

We’re The Thriving Couple. We help high-performing couples build a simple, structured relationship operating system so their marriage does not get crushed by business, kids, and life.



Our work sits at the intersection of relationships, performance, leadership, and personal growth. We are building a premium offer and looking for the right paid media partner to help us create a consistent inbound pipeline through Meta ads.



This is not a plug-and-play ecommerce brand. It is a more nuanced sale that often involves two decision-makers, not one. One partner may raise their hand first, but both often need to buy in. That makes messaging, targeting, and creative testing especially important.



The Role



We are looking for a part-time freelance Meta ads partner to help us build our paid acquisition channel from scratch.



This person will do more than manage campaigns. We want someone who is curious, thoughtful, and hands-on. Someone who wants to understand the offer, test angles, learn quickly, and help shape a funnel that works.



Our current desired path is:



Meta ads ? free workshop or pre-qualifying call ? 6-month engagement



You should be comfortable working in ambiguity, helping us test assumptions, and giving clear recommendations based on what the data says.





What You’ll Do:



Build and manage Meta ad campaigns from the ground up

Help shape early paid traffic strategy, testing plan, and campaign structure

Develop and test hooks, angles, audiences, and creative concepts

Work with us to improve the path from ad click to workshop registration or pre-qualifying call

Identify what is and is not working across creative, targeting, landing pages, and offer positioning

Recommend new testing ideas and approaches based on performance and market feedback

Track results and communicate learnings clearly

Help us move from early testing to a repeatable inbound engine





What We’re Looking For:



We are not looking for someone who only knows how to optimize an already-working account.

We are looking for someone who can help us find what works.

Ideal candidates will have:

Experience running Meta ads for coaching, education, service, consulting, or other trust-based offers

Strong thinking around testing, messaging, and offer-market fit

Comfort working with early-stage brands that are still refining positioning and funnel flow

Ability to translate performance into clear business recommendations

Strong communication and project management

Willingness to be proactive, not just reactive

Curiosity about human behavior, buying psychology, and what makes people convert

Bonus If You Have Experience With

Webinar or workshop funnels

High-ticket or multi-step conversion funnels

Offers where multiple stakeholders influence the purchase

Founder-led brands

Creative strategy and direct response copy

Lead quality optimization, not just lead volume

What Success Looks Like

In the early stage, success is not just lower CPA.



Success looks like:

clear testing roadmap

fast learning on which messages resonate

improving lead quality

stronger conversion path into workshops and calls

better understanding of how to market to couples and how to handle a two-person buying decision

a growing paid channel that becomes more predictable over time





Engagement Details



Part-time freelance role

Remote

Starting from scratch

Flexible structure depending on experience and fit

Opportunity for an ongoing working relationship if the fit is strong





How to Apply



If interested, please send:

A short note on how you would approach a Meta ads funnel for an early-stage brand like this

Relevant experience with coaching, education, service, or high-ticket offers

An example of how you test hooks, audiences, or creative before scaling

Your typical working style, communication cadence, and reporting approach

Your pricing structure or range





A Question We’d Love You to Answer



If you were starting from zero with an offer like ours, how would you think about testing messaging and creative for a market where one partner may be interested first, but both often need to buy in?



Thanks,

James Lockwood

The Thriving Couple

title: AI Specialist Role / Software AI Specialist
description:
Role Overview

The AI Specialist is responsible for planning, integrating, and optimizing AI tools and automations across business platforms. This includes custom-built applications, Google Workspace systems, web-based platforms, and e-commerce stores. The goal is to improve workflow efficiency, automate repetitive tasks, enhance customer experience, and support smarter business decisions.

Key Responsibilities

Implement AI solutions for custom applications and internal tools.

Integrate AI into Google Workspace workflows such as Gmail, Google Sheets, Docs, and Drive.

Build and improve AI-powered features for custom web applications.

Apply AI tools in e-commerce stores for product content, customer support, automation, and data analysis.

Work with developers and stakeholders to identify areas where AI can improve operations.

Test, optimize, and maintain AI integrations for performance and accuracy.

Create AI-driven automations for reporting, data processing, and business workflows.

Monitor AI outputs and ensure quality, usability, and business relevance.

Skills and Expertise

Experience with AI tools, APIs, and automation platforms.

Knowledge of custom app integration and web-based systems.

Familiarity with Google Workspace automation and workflows.

Understanding of e-commerce operations and store management.

Strong problem-solving and process improvement skills.

Ability to translate business needs into practical AI solutions.



AI Tools and Platforms

Beyond core AI models, this role also involves selecting and implementing supporting tools that help businesses automate workflows, connect systems, and deploy AI features faster.

Zapier - for connecting apps, triggering workflows, and automating repetitive tasks between platforms without heavy custom coding.

Make (Integromat) - for more advanced visual automations, multi-step logic, data routing, and API-based workflow orchestration.

Google Apps Script - for extending Google Workspace with custom automation in Sheets, Gmail, Drive, Forms, and Docs.

OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini APIs - for adding chat, content generation, classification, summarization, image support, and AI-powered assistants into business systems.

n8n - for self-hosted or developer-friendly workflow automation when a business wants more control over integrations and data flow.

Shopify Flow and e-commerce apps - for automating store operations such as order handling, tagging, notifications, customer segmentation, and merchandising tasks.

Webhook and API tools - for connecting custom apps, CRMs, ERPs, inventory systems, and support platforms into one AI-enabled workflow.



Expanded Value of the Role

An AI Specialist in this area is not limited to prompting tools. The role combines AI implementation, workflow automation, system integration, and business process improvement. This includes identifying manual tasks that can be automated, choosing the right AI platform or automation tool, connecting services securely, and making sure the final solution is practical, scalable, and aligned with business goals.

title: Creative Strategist (Paid Social/E-Commerce)
description:
Creative Strategist for E-Commerce brand (Meta Ads & Paid Social) - Full-Time, Remote (UK Supplements Brand)

 

Salary: $1,000 - $1,500 USD/month (depending on experience)

Payment: Weekly via Wise. Always on time.

Schedule: Monday-Friday, UK hours (3pm-11pm PHT), some flexibility possible.

Reports to: Marketing Director (company co-founder)

 

Please read the full post before applying. There is a required application instruction at the bottom.

 

 

ABOUT US

 

UK direct-to-consumer supplements brand. 35+ natural products (collagen, biotin, menopause support, creatine, probiotics). Over 350,000 customers. Small remote-first team. Real established company, real revenue. We will share the brand name with shortlisted candidates.

 

 

THE ROLE

 

You will be our in-house creative strategist, turning customer research into ad concepts, scripts, copy, and creative briefs that drive sales. You will research what our customers care about, why they buy, and what language they use, then turn that into creative that performs across Meta ads,
, and landing pages.

 

This is a strategy and copywriting role, not a design or video editing role.

 

 

WHAT YOU WILL DO

 

- Research customers and competitors: mine reviews, surveys, support tickets, competitor ads, Reddit, forums, and social comments to find pain points, desires, objections, and the exact language customers use.

- Develop ad angles, hooks, and concepts for Meta ads. Build a structured testing pipeline with fresh concepts weekly.

- Write scripts for UGC video ads (problem-solution, testimonial, listicle, myth-busting, before/after), copy for static and carousel ads,
 campaigns, and landing pages.

- Write creative briefs for UGC creators and designers, specifying the hook, angle, talking points, tone, format, and visual direction.

- Analyse ad performance (CTR, hook rate, CPA, ROAS) to identify what is working and what to test next. You are not the media buyer, but you must be comfortable using data to guide creative decisions.

- Research competitor ads via Meta Ad Library and TikTok Creative Centre. Spot trends and opportunities.

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Veo3, Gemini daily as part of your creative workflow for copywriting, research, and generating visual/video concepts.

- Write engaging and high converting copy for landing pages, website and
 campaigns as required. 

 

 

REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

 

- 1-3+ years as a creative strategist or direct-response copywriter for a DTC/e-commerce brand or agency

- Proven results: you can talk about specific ads you wrote and the CTR, CPA, or ROAS impact they had

- Experience conducting your own customer research and turning it into ad angles, not just writing copy from someone else's brief

- Strong direct-response copywriting across video scripts, static ads,
, and landing pages

- Experience writing creative briefs for UGC creators or designers

- Active daily use of AI tools: like Claude, Chat GPT or Gemini for copy and research, and AI image/video tools (Veo3, Midjourney or similar).

- Strong written English (you will write customer-facing copy for a UK audience daily)

- Organised and self-directed, able to manage a weekly creative output pipeline without being chased

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace

 

 

NICE-TO-HAVE

 

- Health, beauty, wellness, or supplements industry experience

- Experience with Klaviyo or similar
 platform

- Experience writing for a female 30-55 audience

- Shopify or landing page builder experience (Replo, Gem Pages, or similar)

 

 

HOW TO APPLY

 

Start your application with the exact words: "I have read the full post - here is my application for the Creative Strategist role."

 

Then answer these (please number them 1-6):

 

1. Why are you a good fit for this specific role? (3-5 sentences, no generic cover letters.)

2. Your relevant experience. Be specific: which brands or agencies? What did you write? What results did your creative achieve?

3. Describe your customer research process. When you need to develop new ad angles for a product, where do you look and what do you do?

4. Which AI tools do you use daily and how do you use them in your creative workflow? Give specific examples.

5. Share 1-2 examples of ad copy, scripts, or creative briefs you have written (Google Drive or portfolio link). If you cannot share client work, describe a specific concept you developed and what results it achieved.

 

Also include your expected monthly salary (USD) and availability to start.

 

Applications without the confirmation phrase or that are clearly generic will not be reviewed. We read every application that follows the instructions.

title: SUPPLY CHAIN SPECIALIST (SHOPIFY DROPSHIPPING)
description:
Supply Chain Specialist (Shopify Dropshipping – Clothing)



If you only have Amazon or eBay experience without dropshipping experience, do not apply.



We are a fast-growing eCommerce company operating multiple Shopify stores worldwide in the fashion niche.



We are looking for a reliable and experienced Supply Chain Specialist to help manage order flow, supplier coordination, and delivery performance.



This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who already understands how dropshipping operations work and can take ownership of this part of the business.



Role Overview



Your main responsibility is to ensure that every order moves smoothly from supplier to customer without delays or issues.



You will work closely with our supplier and customer service team to maintain efficient operations and take responsibility for supply chain performance.



Responsibilities



Order Fulfillment and Monitoring



* Verify daily that all orders are fulfilled (no missed orders)

* Monitor order statuses inside Shopify

* Ensure orders are shipped within expected timelines

* Identify delays early and take action



Order Tracking and Problem Prevention



* Track orders that are not yet shipped

* Detect supplier or stock issues

* Follow up with suppliers to resolve delays quickly

* Help reduce refunds and chargebacks



Delivery Issue Handling



* Monitor failed deliveries (Failed Attempt, Ready for Pickup, Exception)

* Report issues to Customer Service

* Help resolve delivery problems before escalation



Supplier and Issue Coordination



* Handle order modifications (address, size, color changes)

* Communicate with suppliers via Slack

* Keep issues organized and tracked



Invoice Checking



* Review supplier invoices daily

* Compare with agreed pricing

* Ensure accuracy before payment



Returns and Cost Recovery



* Follow up on returns (Return-to-China process)

* Ensure cost of goods is recovered

* Track cases until resolved



Optimization



* Identify best-selling products

* Support price negotiations with suppliers



Tools



* Shopify

* Parcel Panel 

* Google Sheets

* Slack and 



Requirements



* Minimum 2 years experience in dropshipping supply chain

* Strong experience with Shopify + Parcel Panel app backend

* Experience working with suppliers or agents

* Strong understanding of order tracking, fulfillment flow, and delivery issues

* Ability to work independently and take ownership

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Proactive mindset and problem-solving skills

* Good written English



We are specifically looking for someone who can operate at a high level, take initiative, and act as a key point of responsibility within the team.



Experience in clothing or fashion dropshipping is a strong plus



Job Details



* 30 hours per week

* Long-term position

* $4.5 to $5.5 per hour depending on experience



Important



We are looking for someone who takes ownership, works independently, and is reliable. This role requires someone who can think ahead, solve problems without constant supervision, and maintain high standards.



Applications must be submitted through the following Google Form:





Any application not submitted through the form will not be considered.



We do not accept AI-generated answers. Any application suspected of using AI will be automatically rejected.



How to Apply



Complete the Google Form and answer all questions carefully.

title: Affiliate Manager
description:
Job Description:



Full-Time | Work From Home | Ecommerce & Influencer Partnerships



SRI Labs is a fast-growing, premium beauty & wellness ecommerce brand known for high-end skincare, hair tools, and breakthrough consumer products. We’re looking for a driven, organized, and relationship-focused Affiliate Manager to lead and scale our affiliate program across platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, and key influencer networks.



If you love partnering with creators, optimizing affiliate performance, and helping a brand grow through relationships — this is the role for you.



What You’ll Do



As our Affiliate Manager, you will own the entire affiliate ecosystem and work directly with the CEO and marketing leadership team to scale creator-led revenue.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize SRI Labs’ affiliate program across ShopMy, Levanta, and other affiliate platforms.

Recruit, vet, and onboard new affiliates, creators, and influencers that align with our brand.

Build strong long-term relationships with partners to drive consistent revenue and brand growth.

Track performance, payouts, ROI, and ensure all affiliates are supported with assets, codes, and campaigns.

Coordinate affiliate-driven launches, seasonal promotions, and strategic campaigns.

Identify top performers and build incentive strategies to maximize their output.

Maintain reporting dashboards and communicate results to leadership weekly.

Collaborate with internal marketing, product, design, and operations teams to support affiliate needs.

Continuously test new platforms, creators, strategies, and incentives to grow revenue.

Who You Are



We’re looking for someone who is:



Based in the Philippines

Experienced in affiliate, influencer marketing, or digital partnerships (1–3+ years preferred).

Organized, reliable, and able to manage many creators and campaigns at once.

Strong at relationship-building — someone affiliates love to work with.

Comfortable working within platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, Impact, or similar tools.

Data-driven with excellent follow-through and communication skills.

Hungry, proactive, and passionate about helping a brand grow.

Why Join SRI Labs?



Remote work

Work directly with a high-performing founding team

Competitive salary based on experience

Long-term growth potential within a fast-scaling ecommerce company

Supportive, positive culture built around speed, innovation, and passion for great products

Opportunity to make a big impact — your work will directly drive revenue and brand expansion

How to Apply



 your resume and a quick 2–3 sentence introduction

title: Email Marketing Manager (ECommerce) - Full Time, Remote
description:
We are looking for a strategic and performance-driven
 & SMS Marketing Manager to lead the charge in growing and optimizing our owned marketing channels. This role is key to delivering high-converting campaigns that drive customer engagement, retention, and revenue across our skincare and hair care product lines. You’ll turn customer insights into action, bringing value at every touchpoint while aligning messaging with product and brand goals.





Primary Duties and Responsibilities:

Own the strategy, execution, and optimization of all
 and SMS campaigns for multiple product lines (e.g., hair thinning shampoo, supplements, anti-aging SPF, and skin supplements).

Segment audiences and personalize messaging to maximize relevance, engagement, and conversion.

Develop and manage high-performing lifecycle flows including welcome, cart abandonment, post-purchase, and win-back sequences.

A/B test subject lines, content, offers, and creative assets to continuously improve key performance metrics (CTR, open rate, CVR, revenue per send).

Monitor and report on campaign performance; adjust strategy based on insights and trends.

Build surveys and gather customer feedback to inform future content and product ideas.

Collaborate with creative, product, and customer experience teams to ensure consistent and on-brand messaging.

Maintain a strong understanding of compliance and best practices in
/SMS marketing (e.g., CAN-SPAM, TCPA).

Qualifications:

3+ years of experience in
 and SMS marketing, ideally in eCommerce or beauty/wellness.

Expert in Klaviyo or similar marketing automation platforms.

Strong writing skills and a keen eye for visual branding and user experience.

Solid understanding of customer behavior, segmentation, and marketing psychology.

Results-oriented with a deep passion for data, testing, and optimization.

Familiarity with tools like Rebuy or product recommendation engines is a plus.

Proactive, curious, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

Passion for skincare, wellness, and helping people feel their best.





What You’ll Help Shape:



Your role goes beyond sending campaigns—you’ll help us build smarter customer journeys by listening to our audience. You'll turn feedback into better product launches, sharper messaging, and a stronger brand voice. You’re part marketer, part strategist, part customer advocate.

title: Direct Response Video Editor (Meta/TikTok)
description:
Direct Response Video Editor (Meta Ads) - Full-Time, Remote (UK Supplements Brand)



Salary: $1,200 - $1,800 USD/month (depending on experience), plus potential performance bonuses for winning creatives.

Payment: Weekly via Wise. Always on time.

Schedule: Monday-Friday, UK hours (3pm-11pm PHT), some flexibility possible.

Reports to: Marketing Director (company co-founder)



Please read the full post before applying. There is a required application instruction at the bottom.





ABOUT US



UK direct-to-consumer supplements brand. 35+ natural products (collagen, biotin, menopause support, creatine, probiotics). Sold on Shopify and Amazon UK. Over 350,000 customers. Small remote-first team. Real established company, real revenue. We will share the brand name with shortlisted candidates.





THE ROLE



You will edit high-converting video ads for Meta 
/Instagram) and TikTok. This is a direct response editing role. Every video you produce needs to stop the scroll, hold attention, and drive a click. We care about performance (CTR, hook rate, hold rate, CPA), not cinematic polish.



You will work from creative briefs and raw UGC footage, turning them into ads that sell. You will also use AI tools daily to generate b-roll, voiceovers, visuals, and video content to speed up production and create net-new content.



This is not a brand content or social media video role.





WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Edit short-form video ads (15 seconds to 2 minutes) for Meta and TikTok from UGC footage, product clips, screen recordings, and stock/AI-generated content.

- Create multiple ad variations from a single concept, testing different hooks, CTAs, pacing, and visual styles. When something works, iterate fast.

- Edit across formats: UGC compilations, problem-solution, testimonial, listicle, myth-busting, before/after, VSL-style, and educational/storytelling.

- Add captions, text overlays, motion graphics, and visual elements that reinforce the hook and keep viewers watching.

- Source and create b-roll using AI video and image tools (Veo3, Kling, Pika, Midjourney). Generate AI voiceovers (ElevenLabs, HeyGen) where needed. This is daily work, not optional.

- Deliver in multiple aspect ratios (1:1, 4:5, 9:16) ready for the media buying team.

- Work from creative briefs provided by our creative strategist. Join weekly alignment calls to review performance and plan the next round of creative.

- Research high-performing ads in our space and bring ideas for new formats, styles, or hooks to test.





REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- 2+ years editing direct response or performance ads for a DTC/e-commerce brand or agency (not brand content, music videos, or YouTube vlogs)

- Strong proficiency in CapCut and/or Adobe Premiere Pro

- Portfolio of ads that have actually run on Meta or TikTok

- Understanding of direct response editing: hooks in the first 1-3 seconds, pacing for retention, scroll-stopping openings, and clear CTAs

- Daily active use of AI tools for video/image generation and voiceover (Veo, Runway, Kling, Pika, ElevenLabs, HeyGen, Midjourney, or similar). You must already be using these in your workflow.

- Fast turnaround and comfortable with high-volume output. We test a lot of creative.

- Can read basic ad metrics (hook rate, hold rate, CTR, CPA) and use that data to improve the next edit

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace





NICE-TO-HAVE



- After Effects or motion graphics skills

- Health, beauty, wellness, or supplements industry experience

- Experience with long-form VSLs (3-5+ minutes)

- Thumbnail or static image creation skills





HOW TO APPLY



Start your application with the exact words: "I have read the full post - here is my application for the Video Editor role."



Then answer these (please number them 1-5):



1. Why are you a good fit for this specific role? (3-5 sentences, no generic cover letters.)

2. Your relevant experience editing direct response ads. Which brands or agencies? What platforms did the ads run on? How many ads were you producing per week?

3. Which AI tools do you use in your editing workflow? Be specific: which tools, how often, and for what exactly.

4. Share a link to 3-5 direct response video ads you have edited (Google Drive, portfolio, or unlisted links). Tell us which platform they ran on. Performance data is a bonus.

5. What is your typical turnaround for a 30-60 second ad edit, and how many ads can you realistically produce per week?



Also include your expected monthly salary (USD) and availability to start.



Applications without the confirmation phrase or that are clearly generic will not be reviewed. We read every application that follows the instructions.

description:

The role involves coordinating and routing piping systems, resolving complex layout challenges, and collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to ensure seamless integration of HVAC, plumbing, and sprinkler systems. The ideal candidate has a strong understanding of construction principles, experience in MEP shop drawings, and the ability to adapt to client-specific templates and workflows. This position requires excellent communication skills, problem-solving ability, and a proactive, self-motivated approach to delivering high-quality technical documentation with minimal supervision.

Out-of-the-box thinker with a reliable, self-motivated, and confident approach; quick learner with a positive attitude.

title: Service Desk Dispatcher
description:
About Koine Ventures



Koine Ventures Inc. is a technology holding company that owns and supports multiple Managed Service Providers (MSPs). Our portfolio companies deliver managed IT and cybersecurity services to organizations that rely on secure and reliable technology infrastructure.



We are building a centralized operations team to help streamline service delivery across our MSP portfolio. We are seeking an experienced Service Desk Dispatcher who understands MSP workflows and can help coordinate incoming support requests, technician assignments, and service desk operations.



Role Overview



The Service Desk Dispatcher serves as the coordination hub for incoming support requests across our MSP service desks. This role is responsible for ticket intake, triage, and dispatching work to the appropriate technical teams while ensuring service requests are documented accurately and handled within SLA expectations.



This role is ideal for someone with prior MSP service desk or dispatcher experience who is comfortable managing ticket queues, coordinating technicians, and keeping service operations running smoothly in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities

1. Ticket Intake & Dispatch

- Serve as the first point of contact for inbound helpdesk requests via phone,
, and ticketing system.

- Create and document support tickets with clear and accurate technical details.

- Triage and prioritize tickets based on urgency, impact, and SLA requirements.

- Dispatch tickets to the appropriate technicians based on expertise, availability, and workload.



2. Service Desk Queue Management

- Monitor the PSA ticket queue to ensure tickets are assigned and progressing toward resolution.

- Track SLA response and resolution timelines and escalate issues when needed.

- Maintain clean and organized ticket documentation within the PSA system.



3. Technician Coordination

- Coordinate technician schedules for remote sessions and onsite visits.

- Balance ticket distribution to maintain technician productivity and service efficiency.

- Assist service desk leadership with workload management and dispatch coordination.



4. Client Communication

- Provide clients with clear and professional updates regarding ticket status.

- Ensure all communication and updates are properly documented within the PSA platform.



Qualifications

- Required

> Experience working in an MSP or IT service desk environment

> 1–3 years of service desk coordination, dispatcher, or helpdesk operations experience

> Experience with PSA tools such as Autotask, or similar platforms

> Strong understanding of ticket triage, queue management, and SLA prioritization

> Excellent communication and organizational skills



- Preferred

> Experience supporting multi-client MSP environments

> Familiarity with remote support operations and technician dispatch workflows

> Understanding of common IT service desk issues and terminology



What Success Looks Like



First 30 Days: Confidently managing helpdesk intake and understanding service desk workflows across MSP operations.

First 60 Days: Independently triaging and dispatching tickets while maintaining an organized service queue.

First 90 Days: Fully owning dispatch coordination and helping maintain efficient service delivery across the MSP service desk.



When applying, please submit your video introduction, resume, and answer the following questions:



1. Please describe your experience working in a Managed Service Provider (MSP) environment. Include the company type, your role, and how long you worked there.



2. Which PSA or ticketing platforms have you used to manage service desk tickets and queues? Please list the systems and briefly describe your experience with them.



3. Have you been responsible for monitoring and dispatching a live helpdesk queue?

If yes, describe how many technicians you supported and how you balanced workload and SLA priorities.



4. This is a full-time remote position requiring availability during U.S. business hours, a wired internet connection, and a quiet workspace. Can you confirm you meet these requirements?

title: Level 2 Help Desk Technician
description:
Summary  

A Level 2 Help Desk Technician will handle everything from routine troubleshooting to complex escalations. In addition, you’ll act as a Project Engineer, providing technical support, working on assigned IT projects end-to-end, and driving the successful onboarding of both client and internal systems.  

 

Key Responsibilities  



Help Desk & Customer Support  

- Respond to customer inquiries via phone,
, or chat.  

- Diagnose and resolve issues related to hardware, software, and network connectivity.  

- Guide customers step-by-step to resolve technical problems using remote-desktop tools and help-desk software.  

- Document and track all interactions and resolutions in the ticketing system and knowledge base.  

- Escalate unresolved or high-priority i
 to Level 3 support and follow up to ensure a timely resolution.  

- Maintain professional, courteous communication to uphold high customer satisfaction.  



Technical & Project Engineering  

- Provide technical support to guide customers remotely, including installation, configuration, and maintenance of computer systems, networks, and peripherals.  

- Perform scheduled maintenance and software updates to ensure systems run optimally. 

- Participate in small- to mid-scale IT projects—from involved in the planning through execution and close-out—ensuring scope, budget, and timelines are met. 

- Collaborate with the remote support team to transition complex i
 into formal service requests or project tasks.  

- Use project management tools to track deliverables, report status, and communicate with stakeholders. 

- Oversee the onboarding of new internal systems—developing processes, conducting user training, and ensuring seamless integration.  

- Educate client IT staff on best practices for IT security, maintenance, and system administration.  



Qualifications  

- High school diploma or equivalent; some college coursework or technical certifications preferred (e.g., CompTIA A+, Network+, Microsoft Certified Professional). 

- 2+ years of experience in a helpdesk or in an MSP environment.  

- Hands-on experience as a technician or project engineer supporting Windows Server, Microsoft 365, and common IT systems.  

- Solid understanding of computer hardware, mobile devices, networking fundamentals, and basic cybersecurity principles.  

- Familiarity with remote-desktop applications, helpdesk/ticketing software, and project management platforms.  

- Strong document-creation skills, with emphasis on developing clear, step-by-step SOPs and How-To Guides for both internal teams and end-users.  

- Excellent troubleshooting, problem-solving, and documentation skills. 

- Excellent English verbal and written communication; able to translate technical concepts for non-technical audiences. Meaning you can speak Human and Tech and make it understandable to others who are not tech-savvy.  

- Ability to work both independently and collaboratively within a distributed remote team.  



Preferred Skills  

- AI-Enabled and for working with large language Models for troubleshooting and engineering.  

- Experience scripting for deployment of tools and updates in RMM (e.g., Datto RMM, EDR) and MDM (e.g., Microsoft Intune) environments.  

- Experience supporting macOS and Linux endpoints.  

- Hands-on knowledge of Azure AD, Okta, and other identity-management platforms.  

- Exposure to server virtualization (Hyper-V, VMware) and basic cloud infrastructure. 

- Understanding of Google Workspace administration. 

- Prior experience managing end-to-end IT projects, including stakeholder coordination and change management.  

- Certification or coursework in cybersecurity fundamentals (e.g., Security+, CISSP Associate).  



Why You’ll Love Working with Us  

You’ll join a dynamic team where your technical expertise and project-engineering skills will directly impact customer satisfaction and successful IT outcomes. We offer continual learning opportunities, certification support, and a collaborative environment that values innovation and professional growth.



Notes: When reaching out, please include your CV and your DISC assessment, thanks!

description:

title: Credit/Funding Client Success Associate
description:
Opulent Consulting Group  ·  Credit Repair & Business Funding  (This role is a Salary based with the ability to Earn commission)



Remote, Full-time / Contract, Client-facing, High Autonomy, Fluent English Required, Credit Repair, Business Funding



About the role



This role does not come with a manager watching over your shoulder. You will own this function completely — and we mean that.



At Opulent Consulting Group, the Client Success Manager is not a support role. It is the operational backbone of our entire fulfillment process. You will manage active credit repair clients, direct the Disputer team, monitor the funding pipeline, and make real decisions every day — without being told to do any of it.



The CEO is not your scheduler, your reminder system, or your safety net. You will set the pace, identify what needs to happen, and execute. If something falls through the cracks, it falls on you — and you're the type of person who doesn't let that happen.



Beyond fulfillment, you are also a key driver of the company's reputation. You will proactively communicate every meaningful update to clients before they have to ask, and you will recognize the right 
nts to collect reviews and testimonials that reflect the real results we deliver.



Language requirement



Fluent spoken and written English is required — no exceptions

This role is client-facing and includes live phone calls with active clients. You must be able to communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally in English in real-time conversation. A heavy accent, difficulty being understood over the phone, or reliance on written communication to compensate for verbal gaps is not workable in this role. If English is not your first language, you must be fully fluent — conversational and professional.



This is not the role for you if... SELF-SELECT OUT IF ANY OF THESE APPLY



You need to be told what to do each day before you get moving

You rely on a manager to prioritize your workload

You go quiet when things get complicated instead of solving it

You need frequent check-ins to stay on track

You treat "nobody told me" as a valid excuse

You have never worked inside GoHighLevel, DisputeFox, MyFreeScoreNow, or 

You cannot hold a clear, professional phone conversation in English



What you'll own



Full client onboarding from signed agreement through active dispute status — you collect every required document and follow up as many times as it takes



Primary client communication throughout the entire engagement via GHL — proactive updates, credit progress summaries, phone calls, and inquiry responses without being asked



Proactive credit progress reporting — every time a client's report is repulled in MyFreeScoreNow, you communicate the changes clearly and immediately in plain language before the client ever has to ask UPDATED



Review and testimonial collection — you identify the right 
nts in the client journey to request reviews and testimonials used as marketing collateral and to build the company's public image NEW

Daily direction and oversight of the Credit Repair Disputer team via Operations Chat on 
 — callouts, directives, and EOD report reviews

Continuous credit report analysis in MyFreeScoreNow and DisputeFox to identify when clients are ready for funding — you make that call and initiate the handoff

Moving qualified clients into the 0% Business Funding Pipeline in GHL and coordinating with the Director of Credit & Funding Operations

Billing and payment monitoring — proactively flagging and following up on delinquencies before they become problems

Daily EOD report submission covering all client activity, pipeline updates, document status, and open items

Maintaining accurate, current records in GHL and DisputeFox — always, not when reminded



What we're looking for



Proven ability to own a function independently — no hand-holding, no babysitting, no waiting

Fluent spoken and written English — you will be on live phone calls with clients and must communicate with total clarity and professionalism



Exceptional written and verbal communication — you are the face and voice of Opulent to every active client

Strong organizational instincts to manage a high volume of active accounts without losing a single detail

Ability to read and interpret credit reports — understanding dispute progress and funding eligibility is non-negotiable

High emotional intelligence — you handle frustrated or demanding clients with patience and professionalism every time

title: Bankruptcy Paralegal (U.S. Law Firm – Chapter 7/11/13)
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines) – Night Shift (Aligned with U.S. Eastern Time)

Company: Van Horn Law Group, P.A.



About Us:

Van Horn Law Group is one of the largest and fastest-growing bankruptcy law firms in the United States. We have helped more than 10,000 clients overcome financial challenges and rebuild their lives. Our practice focuses on Chapters 7, 11, and 13 bankruptcy, and we are known for combining compassion with results.



We are building a high-performance remote team and are looking for a Bankruptcy Paralegal who takes pride in accuracy, ownership, and moving cases forward efficiently. This is a long-term, career-track opportunity with clear growth potential.



Role Overview:

You will play a critical role in managing bankruptcy cases from intake through discharge. This position requires strong attention to detail, excellent communication skills, and the ability to manage multiple deadlines without supervision.



Key Responsibilities:



* Prepare and review bankruptcy petitions, schedules, and statements of financial affairs

* Draft routine motions, notices, and correspondence for attorney review

* Communicate with clients to collect required documents and missing information

* Track case deadlines, trustee requirements, and filing timelines

* Assist attorneys with hearing preparation, 341 meetings, and plan confirmations

* Review documents for accuracy and completeness before filing

* Maintain organized and accurate records in CRM and case management systems

* Proactively identify issues or delays and escalate when necessary



Success Metrics (KPIs):



* Cases prepared accurately and on time

* Reduction in filing errors and rework

* Timely follow-up with clients and document collection

* Meeting internal deadlines and trustee requirements

* Overall contribution to keeping cases moving efficiently



Qualifications:



* 2+ years of experience as a paralegal, legal assistant, or similar role

* Bankruptcy experience (Chapter 7, 11, or 13) strongly preferred

* Excellent written and spoken English

* Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

* Ability to manage multiple cases and deadlines independently

* Tech-savvy (Google Workspace, CRMs, case management systems)

* Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

* Highly responsive, proactive, and accountable



Schedule and Compensation:



* Full-time (40 hours per week)

* Training: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (first 2 weeks)

* Ongoing schedule: Aligned with EST (night shift PH)

* Compensation: $1,200 – $2,000 USD per month (based on experience and performance)

* Performance-based raises and advancement opportunities

* Clear path to Senior Paralegal and Team Lead roles



Why Join Us:



* Long-term, stable position with a growing U.S. law firm

* Opportunity to specialize in U.S. bankruptcy law

* Structured training and support

* Performance-based growth and promotion opportunities

* Be part of a mission-driven team helping clients get a fresh financial start



How to Apply:



Message us:



1. Why you want to work with Van Horn Law Group

2. Your experience with bankruptcy or legal work

3. Your availability in EST hours

4. A brief example of a task where attention to detail was critical

• Are comfortable troubleshooting inventory, fulfillment, and operational issues within Amazon systems.

• Can manage and optimize PPC campaigns with a focus on maintaining performance and efficiency.

• Are detail-oriented, organized, and able to keep the store running cleanly, accurately, and without recurring errors.

title: Freelance Social Media & Content Account Manager
description:
Job Title: Freelance Social Media & Content Account Manager

Location: Remote (Philippines)

 Type: Freelance, Part-Time or Full-Time (20-40 hours per week)

 Rate: Competitive 



About Shot Blast Media

Shot Blast Media is a forward-thinking digital marketing and video production agency specializing in creative content, social media strategies, and innovative marketing solutions. We help businesses expand their digital presence through data-driven campaigns and high-quality, engaging content. We're currently looking for a freelance Social Media & Content Account Manager to help manage multiple client accounts and drive strategic marketing initiatives across different platforms.



Job Overview

We are looking for a freelance Social Media & Content Account Manager to support our team in the Philippines. You’ll play a key role in developing and executing social media strategies, creating content, managing client communication, and tracking campaign performance. Your primary responsibility will be to drive engagement, increase brand visibility, and optimize social media channels for clients.

This position is ideal for someone who is organized, creative, and proficient in social media tools and analytics. You should be comfortable working with clients remotely and have an understanding of AI tools that enhance content creation and productivity.



Key Responsibilities

Social Media Management & Content Creation

Develop and execute content strategies for social media platforms including
, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X/Twitter, and Threads.



Plan, create, and schedule content for multiple clients, ensuring posts align with client goals and KPIs (engagement, reach, conversions).



Create engaging copy for posts, incorporating multimedia (images, video, graphics), and working with available resources like Canva and Premiere Pro.



Repurpose long-form content (blogs, videos) into short-form social content.



Monitor social media trends and use AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Copy.ai) for content ideation and optimization.



Client Communication & Reporting

Act as the primary point of contact for clients, managing day-to-day communication and collaboration.



Schedule bi-weekly or monthly check-ins with clients to provide updates and receive feedback on campaign performance.



Prepare and present data-backed reports on social media performance (engagement, growth, conversions, etc.).



Utilize Google Analytics, Meta Insights, LinkedIn Analytics, and other reporting tools to monitor social media and website traffic.



SEO & Content Optimization

Optimize social media content for SEO, ensuring all posts, blogs, and web copy are properly tagged with keywords.





Basic understanding of SEO tools like Surfer SEO and SEMrush for content optimization (although technical SEO tasks will be handled by our web team).





Paid Media Campaigns

Assist in setting up, optimizing, and tracking paid media campaigns on Meta Ads and Google Ads.





Track and analyze ad performance and suggest optimizations based on campaign results.





AI Integration & Efficiency

Implement AI-powered tools to enhance efficiency, such as ChatGPT for copywriting, Jasper for blog content generation, and Surfer SEO for keyword research.





Suggest new AI tools or techniques to improve workflow, content creation, and reporting.







Key Skills & Qualifications

Social Media Management: Proven experience in managing social media accounts for businesses (minimum 4 years). Experience with
, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, and
 required.





Content Creation: Strong copywriting, graphic design, and multimedia content creation skills. Experience with Canva, Premiere Pro, and basic video editing is preferred.





Analytics & Reporting: Comfortable with Google Analytics, Meta Insights, LinkedIn Analytics, and similar social media tools. Ability to track and report on social media KPIs.





AI Tools: Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, Copy.ai, Jasper, and Surfer SEO for content creation and SEO optimization.





SEO Understanding: Basic knowledge of on-page SEO practices (keyword research, optimizing blog posts, social media content for SEO).





Paid Ads: Some experience with Meta Ads, Google Ads, and A/B testing is a plus but not required.





Client Communication: Excellent communication skills and experience working with clients remotely. Ability to manage client expectations and feedback efficiently.





Project Management: Strong organizational and time management skills, with the ability to juggle multiple clients and projects.





Attention to Detail: Ability to proofread content and ensure consistency across social media platforms.







Desired Attributes

Proactive: You take initiative and can independently manage tasks and projects.





Adaptable: Ability to adjust to different client needs and content strategies.





Creative & Strategic: A blend of creativity for content creation and analytical thinking for data-driven strategy.





Team-Oriented: While working remotely, you should be comfortable working as part of a dynamic team.







Tools & Platforms You’ll Use

AI Tools: ChatGPT, Jasper, Copy.ai, Gamma

Analytics: Google Analytics, Search Console, Meta Insights, LinkedIn Analytics, Buffer, SEMrush

Design/Video: Canva, Premiere Pro, CapCut

Project & Content Management: 
, Google Workspace

Social Platforms:
, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, Threads,
, Google Ads







What We Offer

Competitive freelance rates based on experience.





Flexible working hours – work remotely from the Philippines.





The opportunity to work with a dynamic team of creatives and strategists.





Support and training to help you improve your skillset in AI tools and social media strategies.





Potential for long-term collaboration or full-time employment based on performance.





How to Apply

If you are a creative, data-driven, and adaptable social media professional with experience in content creation and social media management, we’d love to hear from you! Apply with a short your updated CV, portfolio (if available), and a brief cover letter explaining why you are the perfect fit for this freelance position.



Closing Remarks

This freelance role is designed for a self-starter who can handle the responsibility of managing multiple social media accounts, ensuring timely content delivery, and optimizing campaigns based on performance data. The position allows for flexible hours and the opportunity to work with an innovative team focused on delivering high-quality, impactful marketing solutions for our clients.

title: Finance Recruiter
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Finance Recruiter with a strong track record of sourcing and hiring finance and accounting professionals for U.S.-based companies.



This role requires deep familiarity with finance functions across different stages of growth—from early-stage startups to established organizations. You will own the full recruitment lifecycle—from intake and sourcing to interview coordination and offer closure—while partnering closely with hiring leaders to ensure high-quality, business-aligned hires.

If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and excel at identifying top finance talent, this role is for you.



Core Responsibilities

• Source, screen, and recruit finance and accounting professionals for U.S.-based companies.

• Manage the full-cycle recruiting process, including job intake, candidate outreach, interviews, and offer negotiation.

• Build and maintain strong finance talent pipelines using LinkedIn Recruiter, Workable, and other sourcing platforms.

• Develop tailored sourcing strategies for roles across Accounting, FP&A, Corporate Finance, • Payroll, Tax, and Audit.

• Conduct structured interviews to assess technical expertise, analytical skills, and cultural fit.

• Partner closely with hiring managers and leadership to understand team needs, reporting structures, and hiring priorities.

• Collaborate with the People & Compliance team to ensure smooth onboarding and documentation.

• Track recruiting metrics and provide regular pipeline and progress updates to stakeholders.

• Stay current on finance hiring trends, compensation benchmarks, and market demand.



Requirements/Must-Haves

• 3–5 years of experience recruiting finance and accounting roles for U.S.-based companies.

• Strong understanding of finance positions such as Accountant, Senior Accountant, Financial • Analyst, FP&A Analyst, Controller, Bookkeeper, Payroll Specialist, Tax Associate, or Finance Manager.

• Proven ability to manage multiple requisitions simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.
