title: WordPress Website Developer & Marketing Automation Specialist
description:
WordPress Website Developer & Marketing Automation Specialist

Remote



**About Us**:

We are a creative video agency that specializes in delivering high-quality video content and marketing solutions to our clients. We are looking for a skilled and versatile technician who can take our WordPress website to the next level while implementing best practices for organic SEO, developing marketing funnels, building online courses, and leveraging advanced tools for lead generation and visual design.



**Job Overview**:

We are seeking a WordPress Website Developer with a deep understanding of organic SEO best practices and advanced experience with Go High Level for marketing automation and integrations with 
. This role will focus on building, optimizing, and managing our WordPress site, creating funnels, courses, and eye-catching lead magnets. The ideal candidate will be skilled in using AI tools for design and visual content creation, have a strong foundation in marketing technology, and be able to link and track analytics to improve performance.



**Key Responsibilities**:



* **WordPress Development**:



  * Design, build, and manage WordPress websites with a focus on user experience (UX), functionality, and performance.

  * Customize themes and plugins to meet specific business requirements.

  * Implement responsive, mobile-friendly designs to optimize the user experience.

  * Ensure proper security and maintenance of the WordPress site.



* **SEO Strategy**:



  * Implement and optimize on-page SEO (meta tags, headings, alt text, etc.) to improve organic search rankings.

  * Perform keyword research and competitive analysis to inform content strategy.

  * Optimize page speed, mobile performance, and site architecture for better SEO results.

  * Regularly audit the site for SEO performance and make improvements.



* **Go High Level Expertise**:



  * Design and implement advanced funnels for lead generation, sales, and customer nurturing.

  * Set up automations and workflows within Go High Level to streamline marketing campaigns and client management.

  * Create and manage courses, membership areas, and other automated marketing processes.

  * Optimize the CRM setup in Go High Level for maximum conversion and engagement.



* **Course Building**:



  * Design, develop, and implement high-quality online courses using Go High Level and other relevant platforms.

  * Create course content, including video lessons, quizzes, and certificates of completion.

  * Set up member access areas and ensure a smooth user experience for course participants.

  * Integrate the courses with marketing funnels and automated workflows for lead nurturing and sales conversion.

  * Continuously update course materials and enhance the user experience based on feedback and performance analytics.



* **GHL Integrations with 
**:



  * Set up and manage integrations between Go High Level (GHL) and 
 to streamline project management and customer relationship workflows.

  * Build and configure workflows that sync lead, client, and project data between GHL and 
.

  * Ensure seamless data flow between platforms to automate tasks, track progress, and improve team collaboration.



* **Linking Analytics & Reporting**:



  * Set up and configure analytics tools (Google Analytics, Go High Level analytics, and other relevant platforms) to track website, funnel, and marketing performance.

  * Integrate reporting systems to gather actionable insights from website traffic, lead generation, conversions, and sales.

  * Create regular reports and dashboards that highlight key metrics, identify trends, and suggest improvements.

  * Use data-driven insights to optimize SEO, funnels, courses, and overall digital marketing strategies.



* **AI-driven Design & Lead Magnets**:



  * Use AI tools to create visually engaging lead magnets such as eBooks, whitepapers, landing pages, and graphics.

  * Develop high-converting opt-in forms, pop-ups, and other visual assets.

  * Design captivating visuals and banners for digital marketing and website content using AI tools.

  * Collaborate with the creative team to ensure cohesive branding and messaging.



* **Collaboration & Reporting**:



  * Work closely with the creative team to ensure that web design and marketing efforts align with overall brand strategy.

  * Regularly report on website traffic, SEO progress, funnel performance, and marketing automation results.

  * Troubleshoot and resolve any website issues promptly.



**Required Skills & Qualifications**:



* Proven experience in WordPress website development, including custom themes and plugin development.

* Strong understanding of organic SEO best practices and experience with SEO tools (e.g., Yoast, Ahrefs, SEMrush).

* Advanced proficiency with Go High Level, including funnel creation, course building, automations, and CRM management.

* Experience designing and building online courses with a focus on user experience and engagement.

* Experience with integrations between Go High Level and 
, including building workflows and automating data syncing.

* Expertise in linking and tracking analytics using Google Analytics, Go High Level reports, and other relevant tools.

* Expertise in AI tools for visual design (e.g., Canva, DALL·E, or similar tools).

* Strong problem-solving skills with an ability to troubleshoot and resolve website issues quickly.

* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

* Ability to work independently and prioritize tasks efficiently.



**Preferred Qualifications**:



* Experience working in a creative agency or similar environment.

* Knowledge of other marketing tools and platforms (e.g., ActiveCampaign, Zapier).

* Familiarity with Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and other analytics tools.

* Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.



**What We Offer**:



* Competitive pay

* Flexible remote working environment.

* Opportunities for growth and advancement within a dynamic team.

* The chance to work on exciting projects for high-profile clients.



**How to Apply**:

Please submit your resume, portfolio (or examples of past work), and a brief cover letter explaining why you’re the perfect fit for this role.

title: Accountant
description:
Privately Held Investment & Wealth Management Firm



Our finance team plays a central role in the business, ensuring leadership has clear, accurate financial information to guide strategic decisions.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented accounting professional who takes pride in maintaining clean books, building structured processes, and delivering consistent, dependable work. This role owns core accounting operations and is responsible for maintaining accuracy and discipline across recurring monthly cycles.



You’ll work directly with leadership and operate with a high level of autonomy. Success in this role requires strong judgment, follow-through, and comfort managing both day-to-day accounting and critical monthly deliverables in a fast-moving but well-structured environment.



What You’ll Own

• Day-to-day accounting operations across multiple entities

• Timely and accurate month-end close processes

• Account reconciliations and financial reporting

• Payroll processing (Gusto)

• Commission calculations tied to assets under management

• Maintaining organized and reliable financial data

• Preparing account summaries and supporting leadership reporting



What We’re Looking For

• 2+ years of experience as an Accountant or Senior Accountant

• Experience with QuickBooks and Gusto

• Strong Excel proficiency, including working within shared spreadsheets

• Experience in wealth management, financial planning, or financial services

• Prior experience working for a U.S.-based financial company

• Experience calculating commissions and performing reconciliations

• Strong understanding of accounting principles, financial reporting, and compliance (GAAP/IFRS, tax, audits)

• Experience preparing account summaries

• Familiarity with tax reduction strategies is a plus

• CPA preferred, but not required

• Willing and able to complete a background check requiring fingerprinting



How You Work

• Comfortable navigating shared file systems and cloud-based environments

• Confident working directly in shared documents without relying on local downloads

• Quick learner who adapts easily to new systems and processes

• Proactive communicator, comfortable engaging directly with leadership (Slack-based communication)

• Confident asking questions and seeking clarification

• Reliable, analytical, and highly detail-oriented

title: AI Voice Automation Specialist (Go High Level / Vapi / ElevenLabs)
description:
What You Will Be Responsible For

Go High Level:



Building outbound calling workflows from scratch inside GHL automation

Configuring webhook actions to trigger Vapi API calls

Setting up inbound webhook workflows to receive and log Vapi call data

Creating pipeline stages, contact tags, and custom fields for call outcomes

Building hot lead routing logic and LO notification workflows

Setting up SMS follow-up sequences post-call



Vapi.ai:



Creating and fully configuring an AI assistant inside Vapi

Connecting ElevenLabs voice to the Vapi assistant

Writing and refining the assistant system prompt (conversation script)

Configuring call transfer logic for hot leads

Setting up the server URL so call data posts back to GHL

Testing outbound calls end to end



ElevenLabs:



Setting up a Creator plan account

Cloning a voice or selecting and configuring a professional voice persona

Connecting ElevenLabs to Vapi via API key

Retrieving and managing Voice IDs



Twilio / Phone Numbers:



Provisioning local Phoenix area code phone numbers

Connecting numbers to Vapi or GHL LC Phone system

Basic compliance configuration (TCPA-aware setup)



Testing and QA:



Running full end-to-end tests using real phone numbers

Verifying call transcripts and summaries are logging correctly in GHL

Confirming hot lead alerts and pipeline movement work correctly

Documenting what was built so we can replicate it for other LO clients





Required Skills and Experience

You must have hands-on experience with all of the following — not just theoretical knowledge. We will ask you to walk us through what you've built before.



Go High Level — must know workflows, webhooks, custom fields, pipelines, and automation deeply. Agency-level experience preferred.

Vapi.ai — must have built and deployed at least one AI voice agent using Vapi. Must understand assistants, phone numbers, system prompts, server URLs, and the Vapi API.

ElevenLabs — must know how to clone voices, retrieve Voice IDs, and connect ElevenLabs to third-party tools via API.

API and webhook experience — must be comfortable configuring webhook POST requests with custom headers and JSON bodies. You don't need to be a full developer but you need to understand how APIs work.

Mortgage or real estate industry experience — a strong plus but not required. If you understand what a loan officer does and what lead qualification means in mortgage, that's a big advantage.

title: Finance Recruiter
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Finance Recruiter with a strong track record of sourcing and hiring finance and accounting professionals for U.S.-based companies.

This role requires deep familiarity with finance functions across different business stages, from startups to established organizations. You will own the full recruitment lifecycle—from intake and sourcing to interview coordination and offer closure—while partnering closely with internal stakeholders to ensure business-aligned, high-quality hires.

If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and excel at identifying top finance talent, this role is for you.

Core Responsibilities



Source, screen, and recruit finance and accounting professionals for U.S.-based companies.

Manage the full-cycle recruiting process, including job intake, candidate outreach, interviews, and offer negotiation.

Build and maintain strong finance talent pipelines using LinkedIn Recruiter, Workable, and other sourcing platforms.

Develop tailored sourcing strategies for finance roles such as Accounting, FP&A, Corporate Finance, Payroll, Tax, and Audit.

Conduct structured interviews to assess technical expertise, analytical skills, and cultural fit.

Partner closely with hiring managers and cross-functional teams to understand financial team needs, reporting structures, and hiring priorities.

Collaborate with the People & Compliance team to ensure smooth onboarding and documentation.

Track recruiting metrics and provide regular pipeline and progress updates.

Stay current on finance hiring trends, compensation benchmarks, and market demand.

Requirements

Must-Haves for the Role



3–5 years of experience recruiting finance and accounting roles for U.S.-based companies.

Strong understanding of finance positions such as Accountant, Senior Accountant, Financial Analyst, FP&A Analyst, Controller, Bookkeeper, Payroll Specialist, Tax Associate, or Finance Manager.

Proven ability to manage multiple requisitions simultaneously.

Hands-on experience with ATS platforms (Workable preferred) and sourcing tools like LinkedIn Recruiter.

Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

Fluency in English required.

Full-time availability aligned with U.S. business hours (PST overlap required).

Nice-to-Haves for the Role



Experience recruiting remote finance talent in LATAM or the Philippines.

Familiarity with independent contractor hiring models and compliance considerations.

Experience recruiting for startups or high-growth companies.

Exposure to finance roles supporting SaaS, e-commerce, or professional services companies.

title: Call Center VA
description:

title: AI Filmmaker — 60-Second Cinematic Short Films (Remote, Part-Time)
description:
What This Is

We make faith-based clothing that carries a message. We need someone who can tell that story on screen — in 60 seconds, with no camera, using AI filmmaking tools.

Not video editing. Not reels with transitions. Cinematic short films. Mood. Light. Narrative arc. Emotion. The kind of content that makes someone stop and watch twice.

Your One Job

Produce 60-second AI-generated short films for product drops, brand campaigns, and paid ads. Each film has a brief: a product, a scripture, a feeling we are trying to create. You take that and make something that feels like it cost $50,000 to produce.

Think Fear of God meets short film. That is the reference point.

You Are Right For This If



You already use Runway, Kling, Pika, or Sora to create cinematic content

You understand story structure — setup, tension, resolution — even in 60 seconds

You have produced at least 3 pieces you are genuinely proud of

You can take a creative brief and execute without weekly check-ins



You Are Not Right For This If



Your portfolio is stock footage with text overlays

You have never used AI video generation tools

You need detailed direction on every frame



Compensation

$300–$500/month, 15–20 hours per week. Path to full-time as the brand grows.

How to Apply

Three things only:



Your three best AI video pieces. Direct links.

One sentence per video — what was the story you were trying to tell?

What tools did you use to make it?



That is it. Short application on purpose. Your work speaks first.

title: Guest Services Specialist – Voice Operations
description:
Job Summary:



About the Role – Tailwind

You’ll be joining our Tailwind, Extenteam's AI-powered guest communications platform that combines smart automation with real human agents to deliver 24/7 support for short-term rental operators across North America. 



This is a phone-first, high-volume role – you will be on live calls for the majority of your shift handling inbound and outbound guest interactions at pace. Tailwind combines smart technology with real people to deliver 24/7 support, helping our partners provide an exceptional guest experience while growing their businesses.



The majority of your time will be spent on live voice calls, with occasional support across SMS, and chat† messaging channels. If you have handled 60 or more inbound calls per day and can resolve guest issues quickly and calmly over the phone, this role is built for you.



Key Responsibilities:

Handle a high volume of inbound guest calls – resolving booking questions, complaints, maintenance issues, and general inquiries in real time.

Make outbound calls to guests, property managers, and vendors to follow up on open issues and confirm resolutions.

Assist with booking, confirming, and modifying reservations over the phone, including reservation sales support.

Escalate urgent property or guest safety issues immediately per established protocols.

Coordinate with property managers and internal operations teams during live calls to resolve complex situations.

Dispatch vendors (HVAC, plumbing, electrical) verbally and confirm resolution via follow-up call.

Log accurate call notes and dispositions in real time while maintaining full attention on the guest.

Provide ongoing feedback to the team on recurring guest issues and process improvement opportunities.

Attend brief daily huddles and weekly team check-ins.

Performance Standards:

Performance is measured monthly. The two primary metrics are:

Voice Response: 95% of inbound calls answered within 3 minutes

Guest Resolution Rate: 85% of guest inquiries resolved without escalation

Secondary channel targets are also tracked monthly:

SMS/Text Response: 80% responded within 5 minutes

Chat/OTA Message Response: 80% responded within 4 minutes

 Response: 80% responded within 5 hours

Consistent failure to meet primary targets triggers a formal remediation process.



Foundational Requirements:

Minimum 2 years of inbound call center experience with verifiable high call volume (60+ calls per day) – applicants will be asked to confirm previous employer, role title, and average daily call volume during the application process.

Excellent spoken and written English skills – clarity and professionalism on live calls is non-negotiable.

Must be located within Metro Manila, Philippines.

Stable internet connection and a quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for live calls.

Ability to stay composed, empathetic, and solution-oriented on difficult or high-pressure calls.

Accurate and fast note-taker – able to log call details without losing focus on the guest.

Possess critical thinking and problem-solving skills – able to assess situations and act without waiting to be told every step.

Ability to learn new software quickly – you will use PMS and communication tools from day one.

Short-term vacation rental experience such as working at a property management company, guest communication service, or directly for a platform like Airbnb or VRBO is preferred.

PMS experience in the short-term rental industry is a plus.

Must be ready to start by APRIL 2026.

Must be willing to work weekends, afterhours, US time zone.

title: Global Contact Center Manager
description:
About Us

We're Extenteam, a dynamic company revolutionizing the short-term vacation rental industry.

We are expanding from a professional services model to a scalable tech-based subscription-first

model, targeting $2M MRR by the end of 2026.

Tailwind is our guest communication platform built for property managers, blended with a

shared services team of 20+ agents delivering 24/7 support across chat, voice, and messaging.

Every hire we make is directly tied to that growth number.

We are building a new team with an ownership mindset that values execution and takes pride in

doing excellent work with urgency. If you think in systems, default to automation before

headcount, and hold yourself to the same standard you hold your team - we want to speak with

you.

The Opportunity

Extenteam is seeking a Global Contact Center Operations Manager to lead our 24/7 frontline

support team of 20+ agents across the Philippines, Colombia, and India. This is not a traditional

call center management role.

We are looking for someone who approaches operations with an automation-first mindset:

someone who looks at a recurring problem and asks how to eliminate it, not how to staff around

it. You will be expected to continuously improve agent performance through better tooling,

sharper processes, and direct coaching - and when volume spikes or tickets pile up, you're not

above jumping in yourself to close tickets and take calls.

You will own the full operations layer: scheduling, performance, hiring, training, and analytics.

You report directly to the Head of Shared Services and are accountable for the team's output

every single day.

What You'll Own

Operations & Workforce Management

• Own shift planning and workforce allocation across global time zones, with real-time

visibility into coverage gaps and demand patterns.

• Analyze volume trends to drive scheduling decisions and build proactive hiring triggers

before gaps appear.

• Monitor attendance, shift adherence, and workload balance using Power BI, Aircall, and

Hubstaff.

• Jump in directly to close tickets or take calls when needed. You lead from the front.

Performance & Accountability

• Build a high-accountability culture with clear scorecards, documented standards, and

consistent consequences.

• Run structured one-on-ones, investigate root causes behind performance issues, and

distinguish between human error, process gaps, and tooling limitations.

• Design and manage bonus and incentive structures that reinforce the right behaviors.

Automation & Process Improvement

• Continuously identify manual, repetitive workflows and replace them with automation -

routing logic, tagging, triage, and response templates.

• Stay current with AI tools that can reduce handle time, improve first response rates, or

eliminate low-value agent tasks entirely.

• Build processes that scale without requiring proportional headcount increases.

Hiring, Training & Knowledge Base

• Forecast hiring needs and manage recruitment across global markets.

• Own the LMS and training program: onboarding flows, product walkthroughs,

simulations, and ongoing education.

• Maintain SOPs and the agent knowledge base, ensuring content is current, accurate,

and actually used.

Who You Are

Required

• 5+ years of contact center leadership experience managing 20+ agents across global,

multicultural teams.

• Automation-first operator: you have a track record of replacing manual processes with

systems, not just managing around them.

• Hands-on manager: comfortable closing tickets and taking calls yourself when the team

needs support.

• Strong analytical ability using tools like Power BI, Aircall, or equivalent - you build

dashboards and act on what they show.

• Experience building training programs, performance scorecards, and incentive structures

from scratch.

• Available and responsive during EST business hours regardless of location.

Preferred

• Experience in short-term vacation rental, hospitality tech, or property management

operations.

• Familiarity with AI-assisted support tools, chatbot routing, or automated tagging and

triage systems.

• Experience managing teams across the Philippines, Colombia, and India

simultaneously.

Key Attributes

• Automation Mindset: You see a recurring problem and immediately ask how to

eliminate it, not how to manage it.

• Hands-On Leader: You don't manage from a distance. You know the product, you know

the tickets, and you're not too senior to answer a call.

• Performance-Obsessed: You care deeply about metrics and hold the team to the same

standard every week, not just during reviews.

• Execution Focused: You close open loops, follow through on commitments, and build

trust by doing what you said you'd do.

What Success Looks Like

• 30 days: Full visibility into current team performance, scheduling gaps, and process

breakdowns. First coaching conversations underway.

• 60 days: Automation opportunities identified and in progress. Scheduling model

tightened. Performance scorecards live across the team.

• 90 days: Measurable improvement in first response time, AHT, and missed contact rate.

At least one manual process replaced with automation. Team accountability culture

visibly stronger.

Why Join Extenteam

• Direct impact: Your decisions affect every guest interaction across 300+ property

management companies daily.

• Automation-forward environment: We invest in tools and expect you to use them. We

don't solve problems by adding headcount.

• Ownership & autonomy: You run the operations layer. We trust you to make the right

calls.

• Growth trajectory: As Tailwind scales, the scope of this role grows with it.

• Fully remote: Work from anywhere in the world as long as you're available during EST

hours.

Our Interview Process

We move quickly for the right candidate. You can expect to complete the process within 2-3

weeks.

• Intro call with Head of Shared Services (30 min)

• Interview with leadership tea
mber (45 min)

• Operations case study or take-home assignment

• Reference checks and offer

title: Healthcare Appointment Setter – Neurological Rehab Specialist
description:
About the Role: 

Cadence Physical Therapy is a specialized neurological rehabilitation clinic helping patients with Stroke, Parkinson’s, and MS. We are looking for an exclusive, long-term teammate—not a freelancer with multiple clients—to help schedule life-changing care for our patients.



Core Responsibilities:



High-Volume Outbound: Contact 100+ leads per day from
 and Google using 
.

Deep Rapport Building: Move beyond transactional calls; we aim for 20-minute conversations to understand patient history and fears.

Objection Handling: Confidently navigate hurdles like "I didn't sign up" or weather/mobility concerns.

Exclusive Commitment: This is a 40-hour/week role during US Business Hours (8:00 AM – 6:30 PM CT).

The Commitment (Must Agree to This): We have a zero-tolerance policy for "job hopping". To ensure a dedicated partnership, the successful hire must agree to:

Deactivate your onlinejobs.ph profile immediately upon hiring.

Commit to exclusive employment with Cadence; you will no longer apply to other jobs.

In exchange, we provide a stable, "forever" home with performance-based raises and loyalty bonuses.

Compensation & Perks:



Base Salary: $1000–$1600 USD/month depending on experience.

Performance Bonuses: $10 for every booked evaluation that shows up.

Training: We provide full SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) via video so you are never left guessing.



HOW TO APPLY (Applications that skip these steps will be deleted):

Subject Line: Must be "I want to work for Cadence Physical Therapy Buffalo Grove - [Insert name of owner]".  (Hint google our website)...



Screening Questions:

What is the harshest objection you’ve ever handled on a call, and how did you respond?

What are two common symptoms of Multiple Sclerosis (MS)?

Do you agree to deactivate your onlinejobs.ph profile and work exclusively for us if hired?

Where do you see yourself in 5 years?

Proof of Tech: Attach a screenshot of your internet speed test and your computer specs.

Selection Process: We use Hubstaff for time tracking and LastPass for security. Shortlisted candidates will be sent a 20-minute sample project this weekend, with Google Video interviews held on Monday.

title: Data Engineer (Cloud & GIS Focus)
description:
We’re looking for a hands-on Data Engineer who enjoys building things end-to-end — from designing data systems to deploying and running them in production.

If you like owning your work, solving real-world data problems, and building scalable systems in the cloud, this role is for you.

You’ll help us power analytics, AI, and GIS-driven products with reliable, production-grade data infrastructure.



What You’ll Do

Build & Own Data Systems

- Turn business requirements into scalable data solutions

- Design and build clean, maintainable data pipelines (ETL/ELT)

- Develop batch and streaming workflows

- Improve performance, reliability, and monitoring

- Deploy and maintain systems in production



Cloud & Infrastructure

- Work with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and Firebase

- Containerize and deploy services using Docker

- Set up CI/CD workflows with GitHub

- Ensure systems are scalable, reliable, and cost-efficient

- Implement logging, monitoring, and data quality checks



Data & Performance

- Design and optimize PostgreSQL schemas and queries

- Implement validation, observability, and reliability checks

- Support AI and GIS-based data workflows



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have

- 2 years of experience in Data Engineering or similar role

- Strong PostgreSQL experience (schema design & performance tuning)

- Solid Python skills

- Experience with GCP

- Docker experience

- GitHub (including CI/CD workflows)

- Ability to independently deploy and maintain production systems



Nice to Have (Big Plus)

Experience with GIS / geospatial tools such as:

- Shapely

- QGIS

- GDAL

- GeoPandas

- H3

- Google Maps API



Experience working with spatial data or map-based analytics is a strong advantage.



Attach a PDF copy of your resume when you submit your application.

title: Data Engineer
description:
We are seeking a highly driven, hands-on Data Engineer to own and execute our end-to-end data architecture — from requirements definition to system design, implementation, deployment, and long-term operations.

You will build and operate scalable, production-grade data infrastructure that powers analytics, AI systems, and GIS workloads. This role requires both strong engineering fundamentals and a DevOps mindset — you will not only build systems, but deploy, monitor, and maintain them in cloud environments.



Key Responsibilities

 End-to-End Data Ownership

- Translate business and product requirements into scalable technical solutions

- Design clean, maintainable data architecture and workflows

- Implement robust ETL/ELT pipelines

- Ensure long-term maintainability, monitoring, and optimization

- Own deployment, reliability, and ongoing operations



Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps

- Architect and manage cloud infrastructure on Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

- Work with Firebase and managed services

- Containerize and deploy services using Docker

- Implement CI/CD workflows using GitHub

- Ensure high availability, scalability, and cost efficiency

- Establish logging, monitoring, and data governance standards



Data Engineering & Systems

- Build and maintain batch and streaming pipelines

- Design and optimize PostgreSQL schemas, indexing, and performance

- Implement data validation, observability, and reliability checks

- Support AI-driven and GIS-based data workflows



Must-Have Technical Skills

Hands-on production experience with:

- PostgreSQL (schema design, indexing, performance tuning)

- Python (modern dependency management, uv preferred)

- Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

- Firebase

- Docker (containerization & deployment)

- GitHub (version control, CI/CD workflows)

You must be capable of independently deploying and maintaining systems in production.



Nice to Have (Strong Plus)

Experience with GIS / Geospatial systems, such as:

- Shapely

- QGIS

- GDAL

- GeoPandas

- H3

- Google Maps API

Experience working with spatial datasets, spatial indexing, or map-based analytics is a significant advantage.



Experience Requirements

- 3–5 years of experience in Data Engineering or related roles

- Strong foundation in data systems and backend software engineering

- Experience building and operating production-grade systems

- Experience working with cloud-native architectures



Soft Skills

- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- Clear, structured communicator

- Collaborative, low-ego, team-first mindset

- Self-driven and proactive

- Strong ownership mentality — you finish what you start

- Comfortable leveraging AI-assisted coding tools to improve productivity



Preferred Background

- Experience working in remote or distributed teams

- Startup or fast-paced environment experience

- Exposure to AI-coding



Submit your application along with your resume and portfolio link in a google drive link.

Oversee cloud-centric IT projects including migrations, deployments, and infrastructure upgrades

Collaborative and innovative work culture

title: Static & Video Ads Editor (Lead Gen/ Direct Response)
description:
Static & Video Ads Editor (Lead Gen/ Direct Response) 

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full Time

Salary: $700-$900 per month

Experience Required: Minimum 3 Years

Work Hours: 9-6pm UK Time

How to Apply: 

Fill the form: https: //forms .gle/Zn7Bw91Lx64B2moQ9 (Remove the spaces)



Role Overview

We are a fast growing UK pay per lead marketing and scalable agency focused on high volume lead generation for clients in the legal claim sector. Our lead gen campaigns include but it is not limited to personal injury, financial claims, US Motor vehicle a
 & more.

We are looking for a Direct Response Static & Video Ads Editor who understands how to create high-performing creatives for paid media campaigns.

This role goes beyond traditional design. You will work closely with the media buying team to develop static and video ads designed to drive leads, improve conversion rates, and scale profitable campaigns across platforms such as Meta and other paid channels.

You must be comfortable working in a fast-paced Pay Per Lead environment where creatives are constantly tested, improved, and iterated based on campaign data.



Requirements

- 3+ years experience designing direct response or performance marketing creatives.

- Proven experience creating paid social ad creatives for lead generation campaigns.

- Strong portfolio showcasing static ads and short-form videos designed for B2C lead generation ads.

- Strong understanding of how creatives impact ad performance in paid media campaigns.

- Familiarity with creative metrics such as CTR, hook rate, engagement, and conversion rate.

- Ability to design creatives that align with direct response marketing principles.

- Understanding of creative testing frameworks used in performance marketing.



Key Responsibilities

Creative Strategy & Research

- Analyze competitor advertising across platforms to identify winning creative patterns.

- Research industry trends, hooks, messaging angles, and formats that drive engagement and conversions.

- Work with the media buying team to develop creative strategies designed to increaseCTR, CVR, and reduce CPL.

- Generate new creative concepts based on campaign data and market trends.



Ad Creative Concept Development

- Familiar with direct response copywriting.

- Develop multiple creative angles and hooks for each campaign.

- Translate marketing offers into clear, engaging visual narratives designed to generate leads.



Creative Development (Video & Static)

- Design high-performing static ad creatives optimized for
, TikTok, X etc.

- Edit short-form video ads (15–60 seconds) for lead generation campaigns.

- Create motion graphics, animated elements, and visual storytelling that drive quality CTR.

- Edit UGC footage, stock footage, and internal assets into compelling ad creatives.



Creative Testing & Iteration

- Produce multiple creative variations for A/B testing.

- Iterate quickly based on performance data and feedback from the media buying team.

- Refresh and scale winning creatives by producing new variations and iterations.

- Leverage AI to maximise creative outputs at scale.



Performance Optimisation

- Work closely with the media buying team to understand which creatives are driving results.

- Identify patterns in high-performing ads and replicate scalable frameworks.

- Continuously improve creatives to increase click-through rate, lead quality, and conversion rates.



Workflow & Asset Management

- Maintain organized creative assets and project files.

- Deliver creatives in the correct formats and specifications for each advertising platform.

- Work within a structured creative pipeline producing multiple ads weekly.



Technical Skills

- Proficiency in Editing Tools like:

- After Effects

- Premiere Pro

- Photoshop

- Illustrator

- Figma

- CapCut or similar rapid video editing tools (a plus)

- AI edit Tools

- Chatgot

title: Remote Content Coordinator
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, organized, and creative Remote Content Coordinator to join our team. Since we operate in the fast-paced world of real estate investment, we need someone who can work independently from their home office to keep our brand polished and our back-end organized.



Real estate is all about trust. Your mission? Take complex market data and dry investment jargon and turn it into clear, punchy content that gets people excited to grow their wealth with us.



What You’ll Be Doing

Keeping Investors in the Loop: Owning our remote communication strategy—newsletters and market updates—so our investors always know exactly how their money is working for them.



Creating "Must-Read" Content: Researching and writing blogs and LinkedIn articles that break down trends like ROI and passive income.



Social Media Hype: Managing our company pages to show off our latest wins and keep our brand top-of-mind.



The "Digital Glue" (Admin): Keeping our team running smoothly—handling scheduling, organizing cloud-based files, and keeping our investor database (CRM) up to date.



A Bit of Bookkeeping: Tackling light data entry or tracking project expenses. You don't need to be a CPA, but you should be comfortable in a spreadsheet and have an eye for detail.



Staying Sharp: Double-checking the details. In this industry, accuracy is everything, so you’ll make sure our facts are straight and our marketing stays compliant.



ONLY APPLICATIONS SUBMITTED THROUGH OUR CAREER SITE WILL BE CONSIDERED.

title: Need a Next Level YouTube Editor
description:
— WHO WE ARE —…



We are a small group of friends looking to make our mark on the YouTube landscape, with our action-packed and humorous gameplay and challenges.



Check out our channel: 



— WHAT WE‘RE LOOKING FOR —



We’re looking for remote, highly experienced Video Editors who aspire to be the best YouTube editors in the world. Period.



If hired, you will spend the majority of your time editing and animating fast-paced, highly engaging YouTube videos (our style could be compared to Game Theory, MortarMarv, or Finzar).



Our team culture is always supportive and encouraging, but you should also expect to be held to an exceptionally high standard because that’s how we become the best in the world at what we do (If you hate getting lots of revisions/feedback on your work, you won’t fit in here).



Your day-to-day will also involve analyzing previous videos' Viewer Retention Analytics Graphs to uncover opportunities to improve future edits.



— THE IDEAL CANDIDATE —



Here are the main skills and abilities we’re looking for in our applicants:



VIDEO EDITING (Required): Obviously, you must be an exceptionally talented video editor from a technical perspective. However, you must also have the passion, creativity, and sense of humor to be able to turn bland, average footage into highly engaging videos that educate AND entertain viewers.



ANIMATION (Required): You must be capable of creating high-quality 2d overlay, titling, and keyframing animations that visually illustrate the concepts we discuss in our videos.



— YOUR KPIs —



Your performance will be graded using the following KPIs:



1 Good Audience Retention, which we’ll be able to measure and learn from through our YouTube analytics.



2 The number of revisions the videos you edit require before being finalised (the less, the better)



3 The number of hours it takes you to create a video (the less, the better)



— WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU —



Here are just some of the areas where you’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow at our channel.



STABLE & SECURE: This is a very stable and secure job. Our most senior editors have been working with us full-time for 3+ years. No more wishy-washy freelance gigs.



LEADERSHIP OPPORTUNITIES: If you prove yourself and we continue with our current growth rate, you will likely be presented with senior opportunities down the track.



LEARN FROM THE BEST IN THE WORLD: With us, you get to learn from people who are constantly striving to be the best in the world. We’re supportive and encouraging of one another, but we also hold each other to very high standards.



CREATIVE FREEDOM: Once you’ve mastered our style, we encourage outside-the-box thinking. We’re always open to experimenting with new techniques and styles, and then we analyze the data to see how viewers react.



FLEXIBLE WORK HOURS: You can work whenever you want within reason; however, we expect you to be available for tea
etings (We are based in California, and tea
etings are usually in the late evening PT).



— TO APPLY —



If you're interested, please submit the following form (No need for a CV or cover letter. It’s not the 1900s anymore :D):






Please note: All successful job applications will start with a virtual interview and trial project/s to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Thank you for your consideration, and best of luck on your job search!

title: Ecom video editor
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



VERY Highly valued skill:

- AI: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Kling, Nano Banana

Candidates with this skill set will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The Big opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

“I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have AI experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you.

Speak soon, Karos

mbers can earn $8–$12+/hour equivalent

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (Contract) – Legal Tech Platform
description:
Senior Full-Stack Developer (Contract) – Legal Tech Platform

Remote – Contract (3–6 months, potential long-term role)



About Summerall Law

Summerall Law is a technology-forward estate planning firm building a new platform called Essential Estates.

Essential Estates aims to automate and simplify estate planning and trust administration while reducing legal complexity and cost for families. 

The platform will eventually power estate planning services for multiple law firms.



The Role

We are seeking a senior full-stack developer to work on a key platform initiative.

The first major project will be replacing the firm's current Formstack-based document generation system with an internal platform that supports automated document generation and editing.

This is a contract role initially focused on delivering a high-impact system that will become a core part of the Essential Estates platform.



Primary Responsibilities

Design and implement a document automation system that:

• Generates legal documents from structured data

• Supports merge fields and template rendering

• Allows attorneys to edit language without breaking document regeneration

• Integrates with the Essential Estate platform backend

• Replaces the current Formstack Documents workflow

You will collaborate with:

• existing engineering team

• product leadership

• designers

• attorneys who use the system daily



Technology Stack

Frontend

React

TypeScript

Backend

NestJS (Node)

Database

PostgreSQL

Infrastructure

AWS



Requirements

• 5+ years experience building production web applications

• strong experience with React and Node-based backend frameworks

• experience designing backend APIs and data models

• ability to work independently in a small team environment

• strong English communication skills

• proficiency in leveraging AI and AI agents to prototype and ship code

Candidates must overlap with US Pacific afternoon working hours (at least noon-6pm Pacific).



Nice to Have

Experience with:

• document generation systems

• templating engines

• workflow automation systems

• legal technology platforms



Contract Details

Initial contract: 3–6 months

Possible extension or long-term role depending on project needs.

• Eastern Europe

• Latin America



How to Apply

Compensation

title: Video Editor - Meta Ads
description:
We partner with medical practices and doctors to build dominant digital presences through strategic content and paid advertising. We capture high-quality video content in quarterly shoots and transform that raw footage into organic posts and high-converting video ads that position our clients as the leading authorities in their medical markets. We’re now expanding our team to meet growing demand. I’m looking for an absolute expert in video editing.



Role & Responsibilities

As our Video Editor, your main responsibilities will include:

- Reviewing and organizing hours of footage

- Adding B-roll, subtitles, and appropriate music to talking head videos

- Editing multiple short-form reels for Meta ads and organic content

- Creating eye-catching, scroll-stopping content

- Managing multiple projects while meeting deadlines

- Proficiency in CapCut Pro and Adobe Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator)

- Working with a reliable internet connection and a computer capable of handling video editing software

- Comfortable communicating and collaborating through Asana and Slack





What We’re Looking For

You should have:

- Advanced English language skills

- An upbeat, helpful attitude

- 100% honesty and transparency

- Attention to detail (e.g., include your zodiac sign in the subject line!)

- Advanced knowledge of hooks and viral video techniques

- Advanced understanding of Meta ads

- Optional but valuable: Graphic design skills (thumbnails, social media graphics, motion graphics)

- If you cannot commit to daily output of 5–10 videos, please do not apply.



What We Value Most

- Good taste in design and content

- Timeliness and reliability

- Honesty and integrity

- Continuous desire to improve

- Asking questions and seeking clarification when needed

- Ability to follow step-by-step instructions

 A self-starter mindset and fearlessness in learning and helping



Work Schedule

- 5 videos edited per day

title: Production Manager / YouTube Producer (Med School Insiders) - FULL TIME
description:
Med School Insiders | 3 Channels | 2M+ Subscribers | Mission-Driven Team



Med School Insiders is hiring a YouTube Video Producer to transform recorded content—voiceovers, talking head footage, screen recordings—into polished, high-performing YouTube videos across our three channels: Med School Insiders, Kevin Jubbal, M.D., and Jubbal & Cars.



This is a production and operations-focused role, ideal for someone who thrives on structure, timeliness, and quality control. You’ll be responsible for ensuring every video is delivered on time, on brand, and without compromise—by coordinating with editors and animators, enforcing SOPs, running quality checks, and publishing content across platforms.



You’ll report directly to the CEO and work closely with the Director of Content to execute a shared creative vision. If you’re the kind of person who takes pride in smooth systems, loves checklist-driven consistency, and knows how to lead creatives without letting deadlines slip—you’ll thrive here.



---



Responsibilities



- Oversee the entire post-production process across 3+ YouTube channels and supporting platforms (Instagram, Vimeo, etc.)

- Manage a team of video editors and motion designers, ensuring timely execution and adherence to our quality standards

- Review drafts, give actionable feedback, and ensure final outputs match the creative brief, brand voice, and formatting guidelines

- Use checklists and SOPs to maintain consistent video quality, pacing, formatting, and technical specs across all content

- Handle video uploads and publishing: write metadata, optimize for SEO (title, tags, description), add end screens, playlists, and cards

- Run A/B tests (thumbnails, titles), monitor performance analytics, and coordinate improvements across the funnel

- Train new editors and animators on our systems and workflows, and help them use tools like **Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Powtoon**

- Stay current on YouTube best practices, algorithm changes, and platform tools (YouTube Studio, Vimeo, TubeBuddy, VidIQ)



---



Who You Are



- 3+ years producing and publishing content for YouTube or similar digital video platforms

- Strong project manager with proven ability to lead creatives and keep projects moving without delay

- Familiar with Adobe Creative Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects), Powtoon, and remote collaboration tools (Google Drive, Notion, Slack)

- Detail-oriented and operationally minded—you rely on systems, SOPs, and checklists to ensure excellence every time

- Comfortable making judgment calls on quality: You know when a video is “good enough” and when it needs revision

- Clear communicator with strong organizational and time management skills

- Zero tolerance for missed deadlines or sloppy execution—you take full ownership of output



---



Bonus Points



- Familiarity with educational or professional development content

- Experience with short-form vertical video workflows (YouTube Shorts, Reels, TikTok)

- Experience training or onboarding editors and creatives into an existing video production pipeline

- Knowledge of animation pipelines using tools like Vyond, Powtoon, or Adobe Animate



---



What You’ll Get



- A high-impact role with direct access to the CEO and key leadership

- Remote flexibility and autonomy, with clear structure and performance expectations

- A chance to scale content that genuinely helps people—from premeds to physicians

- Opportunities for growth into team leadership or operations roles as we scale



---



How to Apply



Follow the instructions in this Google Form:



---



We are not looking for someone who just “keeps things moving.” We’re looking for someone who can enforce high standards, manage creatives, publish with precision, and keep a production calendar airtight. If you take pride in excellence and execution—and want to help millions of students and doctors through world-class content—apply now

title: Freelance Video Editor (YouTube & Content Growth Focus)
description:
Company: Shot Blast Media

Location: Remote-based in the Philippines

Working Basis: Ongoing freelance contract

Commitment: Approx. 2–3 days per week

Start Date: ASAP

Budget: ?25,000–?35,000 per month freelance retainer, depending on experience



Shot Blast Media is looking for a creative, versatile, and experienced Freelance Video Editor to support our team on an ongoing freelance basis, with an expected commitment of around 2–3 days per week.



This is a fully remote, editor-focused role for someone who can confidently move between fast-paced social edits, brand content, founder-led personal brand content, and longer-form YouTube and storytelling-led edits.



You’ll be editing a wide range of content — from punchy vertical social videos with strong 3–5 second hooks, to longer-form brand stories, case studies, founder-led content, and YouTube videos. We’re looking for someone with strong creative instincts, solid technical ability, and a sharp eye for storytelling, but also someone who understands how content performs across platforms and can use that understanding to shape better edits over time.



The ideal person will be comfortable looking at performance data, understanding what it is saying, and using those insights to improve pacing, hooks, structure, retention, and overall content performance. This role is not just about editing well — it is about helping content perform better, travel further, and contribute to long-term channel growth.



You’ll work closely with our team remotely, collaborating across projects and agreed deadlines, with some overlap with UK working hours preferred for communication and feedback.



This freelance engagement has the potential to develop into a full-time permanent role in future, depending on business needs and mutual fit.



What You’ll Be Working On



Short-form social media content for brands, especially vertical/portrait formats

Content creation edits for both client brands and founder-led personal brand content

Longer-form YouTube videos, brand stories, case studies, and documentary-style edits

Promotional, brand, and campaign videos

Repurposing existing long-form and archive content into fresh, platform-specific edits

Supporting the growth and development of YouTube channels through stronger editing, optimisation, and content repurposing

Helping build channel authority through consistent, strategic, high-quality content output



What You’ll Do



Edit engaging, high-quality video content across multiple platforms

Build strong 3–5 second hooks that capture attention quickly

Add energy, pace, and polish through strong editorial choices

Edit content for both brand channels and founder-led personal brands

Repurpose older and existing content into new edits for social, YouTube, and wider content distribution

Work closely with producers and creatives throughout the edit process

Incorporate basic motion graphics in After Effects, including titles, transitions, and callouts

Maintain consistency, quality, and technical accuracy across all deliverables

Manage multiple projects efficiently and hit deadlines

Organise project files clearly and work effectively within a remote workflow

Edit with YouTube best practice in mind, including pacing, structure, retention, and audience engagement



Support channel growth through a solid understanding of titles, thumbnails, watch time, audience retention, click-through rate, discoverability, and SEO fundamentals



Analyse content performance data and use insights to shape stronger edits over time



Understand audience behaviour and apply that understanding to hooks, storytelling, structure, and edit decisions



Help identify opportunities to improve channel performance, strengthen content strategy, and build long-term channel authority



Role Requirements

Experience & Background



5+ years’ editing experience in a production agency, post-production environment, or similar creative setting

Proven ability to edit both portrait social content and longer-form narrative or YouTube-led content

Experience editing for brands, campaigns, founder-led content, case studies, or documentary-style pieces

Strong understanding of pacing, story flow, and structure

Experience repurposing content strategically across multiple platforms

Experience supporting YouTube channels or content-led brands is highly desirable



Technical Skills



Highly proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro

Competent in After Effects for basic to intermediate motion graphics

Skilled at creating strong, attention-grabbing opening hooks

Good understanding of codecs, formats, aspect ratios, and delivery specs

Basic audio, colour, and finishing skills

Confident working remotely with shared drives, feedback rounds, and organised project workflows

Good understanding of YouTube workflows, channel optimisation, and SEO best practice

Able to work with existing content libraries and identify repurposing opportunities

Good understanding of YouTube analytics, performance data, and audience behaviour

Able to interpret data and turn it into practical editing improvements



Creative Skills



Ability to add flair, texture, and polish to edits

Strong sense of rhythm, timing, and emotion

Good visual design instincts

Ability to elevate storytelling through thoughtful editorial choices

Strong understanding of what makes content work across social, branded, and YouTube formats

Able to shape edits with both creative quality and platform performance in mind

Understands the nuance of crafting content based on data, audience behaviour, and platform insight, not just instinct alone



Soft Skills



Collaborative and comfortable working as part of a remote team

Able to take feedback well and make fast iterations

Highly organised with strong time-management skills

Detail-oriented, proactive, and reliable

Strong communication skills and comfortable working across time zones

Curious and proactive in using performance insights to improve future content



Best summary of the role



This role is ideal for an editor who can do more than just cut content together. We’re looking for someone who understands how to craft strong edits, how content performs, and how to use data and platform insight to improve results over time — particularly across YouTube, social media, brand content, and founder-led channels.

title: Full-Time UI/UX Designer Contractor Kingdom
description:
About Contractor Kingdom

Contractor Kingdom is a digital marketing agency that builds custom websites and runs local SEO campaigns for home service businesses across the United States, HVAC companies, plumbers, roofers, electricians, and more. Our clients trust us to make them look professional online, and design quality is at the heart of what we deliver.

We're a smaller, 3 hands on founders  with a tight-knit remote team with that takes pride in the work we put out. If you're looking for a place where your design skills directly shape the final product clients see, this is it. 



The Role

We're hiring a full-time UI/UX Designer to create custom website page designs in Figma, working under our Head Designer. This is not a template-tweaking job. You'll be designing unique pages, About Us pages, service pages, special offer pages, maintenance plan pages, and more following provided content, for real businesses that rely on these sites to win customers.



Your primary focus:



Design custom website pages in Figma based on direction from our Head Designer

Take a client's brand identity and expand it into fully fleshed-out page designs following provided media & content — custom bullet point icons, unique section layouts, consistent visual language pulled from the homepage inspiration

Deliver polished, developer-ready Figma comps that our Dev WordPress build team can execute faithfully



When you're not designing website pages, you're our go-to creative problem solver:



Reshape and clean up client logos when source files aren't available (this happens a lot)

Create favicons, and thumbnails

Design static ad creatives for client campaigns

Build internal brand assets for Contractor Kingdom

Handle any other visual/design tasks that come across your desk, jack of all trades mentality

Bonus if you have 3D video rendering skills 





What You Must Bring



Strong experience with Figma (this is your primary tool, day in and day out)

Proficiency in Photoshop for image editing, logo work, images and asset creation

. We are looking for someone who understands the importance of optimized product detail pages and how to help us win the digital shelf through best-in-class product content. The successful candidate will spend most of their time within the

title: Visual Content Builder for YouTube Channel - DTC Marketing (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
We're building a YouTube channel focused on creative strategy for DTC and e-commerce brands. The channel is growing fast and we need someone to take video outlines and build them into polished visual whiteboards that the founder films against.



This is not a video editing role. You are building the visuals that appear on screen during filming. Think charts, diagrams, frameworks, comparisons, and images arranged on a digital whiteboard (Miro) that the founder scrolls through while talking.



What You'll Do



Take a video outline with visual descriptions and build each visual on a Miro board. Create charts and graphs using AI tools like Graphy, Miro AI, or similar platforms. Build diagrams, flowcharts, frameworks, and comparison graphics that explain concepts visually. Generate or source images using AI image generators (Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar) when the outline calls for visual metaphors or reference images. Add text blocks with key phrases, definitions, or labels onto the board. Arrange everything in the correct order with clean spacing so the founder can scroll through it naturally during filming. Create LinkedIn carousel slides in Canva based on outlines provided (black background, white text, 1080x1080 format). Deliver 1 to 2 finished boards per week plus 1 to 2 carousel designs.



What You Won't Do



You won't be editing video. You won't be on camera. You won't be writing scripts or outlines. You won't be managing social media accounts. You receive a clear brief for every board and you build it. The creative direction comes from us. You execute it.



Who You Are



Strong design sense. Not a professional graphic designer, but you know what looks clean, readable, and well-organized versus what looks cluttered and messy. Comfortable with Miro, Canva, or Figma. You'll be building in these tools daily. You don't need to be an expert in all three. Proficiency in at least one and willingness to learn the others. Comfortable with AI tools. You should be able to use AI chart generators, AI image generators, and Miro AI to speed up your work. Building everything from scratch manually is too slow. AI does the heavy lifting, you refine and arrange. Detail-oriented. Spacing, alignment, font consistency, color consistency. The small things matter. Every board should look like it came from the same brand. Reliable and communicative. You deliver on time. If something is unclear or you're running behind, you say so early. No surprises. Available during US business hours. Minimum 4 to 6 hours of overlap with EST.



Required Experience



Experience with at least one design or whiteboard tool (Miro, Figma, Canva, or similar). Experience creating charts, diagrams, or visual presentations. Experience with AI image generation tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar). Strong written English for communication.



Bonus (Not Required)



Familiarity with the DTC, e-commerce, or digital marketing space. Experience building YouTube content or presentation visuals. Experience with Graphy or similar AI chart tools. Understanding of what makes educational content visually engaging.



Our Visual Style



Black and white with grey accents. Clean. Minimal. Professional. No bright colors unless they serve a specific purpose in a chart. No decorative elements. No gradients. Think high-end consulting firm, not colorful infographic. Every visual should be easy to read at a glance on a screen recording.



Tools We Use



Miro (primary whiteboard). Canva (carousels and social graphics). Graphy (charts and data visualization). Midjourney or similar (AI image generation). Google Workspace (communication and file sharing).



How to Apply



Send a short message introducing yourself. Include 2 to 3 examples of visual work you've done (charts, diagrams, presentations, whiteboard designs, or anything that shows your design sense). Tell me which tools you're most comfortable with. Mention any experience with AI image generation or AI chart tools.



We'll send a test task to qualified applicants before making a final decision.

title: Marketing and Social Media Manager
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a part-time or full-time strategic, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to lead and execute our social media and digital marketing efforts from start to finish. This is not a “post-and-go” role. We are looking for someone who can think strategically, execute consistently, and manage the full lifecycle of marketing initiatives with direction and vision provided by the owner. 



You will take ownership of social media, content planning, and digital marketing execution while collaborating closely with the founder to ensure everything aligns with the brand’s voice, goals, and standards.



Key Responsibilities

- Lead and execute social media strategy across platforms (Instagram, Pinterest, TikTok, etc.)

- Create and manage monthly and quarterly marketing calendars

- Develop and schedule content aligned with brand goals

- Create the concept and edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok-style content)

- Design graphics using Canva (brand-aligned templates, posts, stories)

- Support SEO initiatives (blog formatting, keyword optimization, SEO audits)

- Update and maintain the company website using WordPress (Elementor)

- Repurpose content across platforms to maximize reach

- Track performance metrics and suggest optimizations

- Stay organized and ensure deadlines are met consistently

- See projects through from concept to execution to completion



Required Skills & Experience

- Proven experience managing and executing social media for a brand or business

- Strong understanding of digital marketing strategy, not just posting



Experience with:

- Canva

- Video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar)

- WordPress (Elementor specifically)

- SEO fundamentals (on-page SEO, keywords, metadata, blog optimization)

- Ability to follow brand guidelines while also offering thoughtful ideas

- Strong organizational and time-management skills

- Excellent written communication in English

- Comfortable working independently and taking ownership

- Experience executing content calendars without constant supervision



This role is best suited for someone who:



- Thinks strategically but enjoys executing

- Takes initiative and ownership

- Is organized, proactive, and reliable

- Can manage multiple tasks without missing details

- Enjoys seeing projects through from start to finish

- Is open to feedback and committed to high-quality work



Trial Period

Final candidates will be invited to participate in a paid 7-day trial involving clearly defined tasks. This allows both sides to confirm fit, communication style, and working rhythm before moving forward.



How to Apply

Please include the following:



1. Provide a video (5 minutes or less) answering the following questions:

     - An introduction of yourself

     - If you are given a general goal (e.g. “increase inquiries from Instagram from 10 to 30 per month”) but no step-by-step instructions. Walk us through how you would approach this from planning to execution



2. Complete and submit this form:

title: Cold Email Marketing Specialist
description:
ABOUT US:

We are a fast-growing internet marketing agency specializing in AI-powered receptionist systems for wellness centers, fitness studios, and boutique gyms. Our mission is simple: help businesses never miss another call, automate bookings, and increase revenue effortlessly.



We move fast, value results, and reward people who take ownership.



ABOUT THE ROLE:

We are looking for a highly skilled Cold
 Marketing Specialist to manage and execute outbound
 campaigns. This is not a beginner role—we want someone who understands deliverability, inbox management, and how to generate real replies (not just send
s).



You will be responsible for setting up, managing, and optimizing cold
 systems that consistently generate qualified leads and booked appointments.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Set up and manage cold
 campaigns (daily sending, monitoring, optimization)

- Manage multiple inboxes and domains (Google Workspace or similar)

- Warm up
 accounts and maintain deliverability health

- Upload and manage lead lists

- Personalize
 campaigns when needed

- Monitor campaign performance (open rates, reply rates, positive responses)

- A/B test subject lines, messaging, and sequences

- Handle basic replies and tag qualified leads

- Ensure all campaigns avoid spam triggers and follow best practices

- Continuously improve campaign performance and suggest ideas



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE:



- Proven experience with cold
 marketing (REQUIRED)

- Strong understanding of:

-
 deliverability (SPF, DKIM, DMARC)

- Inbox warm-up strategies

- Spam avoidance and best practices

- Experience using tools like:

- Instantly, Smartlead, or similar platforms

- Google Workspace /
 inbox management

- Ability to manage multiple campaigns at once

- Strong written English (clear, natural, conversational tone)

- Attention to detail and organization

- Ability to follow systems AND think independently



IDEAL CANDIDATE:



- Has experience generating real leads (not just sending
s)

- Is proactive and takes initiative without being micromanaged

- Communicates clearly and gives updates regularly

- Problem-solver mindset (doesn’t wait to be told what to do)

- Hungry to grow and improve

- Takes pride in their work and performance





BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED BUT A PLUS):



- Experience with lead sourcing tools (Apollo, Clay, etc.)

- Copywriting skills for cold outreach

- Experience in the fitness, wellness, or local business niche

- Familiarity with AI tools or automation



COMPENSATION:



- Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

- Performance-based bonuses tied to results (reply rates, booked calls, etc.)

- Long-term opportunity for growth within the company



HOW TO APPLY:



To apply, please include:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with cold
 marketing

3. Tools you’ve used

4. Results you’ve achieved (open rates, reply rates, etc.)

5. The word “Inbox” at the top of your application (to confirm attention to detail)



IMPORTANT:

We are looking for someone long-term. If you are reliable, detail-oriented, and driven to produce results, this role can grow into a higher-paying position with more responsibility.





We’re not just looking for someone to “do tasks”—we’re looking for someone who wants to own this channel and win with us.

title: Amazon Ungating & Seller Support Specialist (UK & US)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon Ungating & Seller Support Specialist to help our business get approved to sell brands and categories in the UK and US marketplaces.



This role is specifically focused on Amazon category approvals, brand ungating, case handling, and back-and-forth communication with Amazon Seller Support and related teams. We already have genuine business documentation and legitimate supply chain documents. We need someone who understands how to present these correctly to Amazon and manage the process efficiently.



What you will be doing:

Reviewing our invoices, authorisation letters, and supporting documents

Identifying what is missing or what may cause Amazon to reject an application

Submitting ungating applications for brands and categories in Amazon UK and Amazon US

Handling the back-and-forth with Amazon Seller Support through Seller Central

Writing clear and professional case responses and follow-ups

Reapplying when needed with improved documentation and explanations

Tracking all applications, statuses, next actions, and outcomes

Advising us on the best route to get approvals as quickly as possible using legitimate methods only



Important:

You must work only within Amazon’s policies

No fake invoices, no manipulated documents, and no black-hat methods

We only want someone who can help using real documentation and compliant processes



Requirements:

Strong experience with Amazon Seller Central

Proven experience getting brands or categories ungated in Amazon UK and/or Amazon US

Strong written English

Very organised and detail-oriented

Able to explain clearly why an application was rejected and what should be changed

Comfortable managing multiple cases at once

Must understand invoices, supplier documentation, letters of authorisation, and Amazon compliance expectations



Preferred:

Experience with grocery, topicals, beauty, supplements, or other restricted categories

Experience with account health, appeals, and policy-related case handling

Experience working with wholesalers, distributors, and branded products



How we will work:

You will be given appropriate access to our Seller Central account through user permissions

You will communicate through the account and keep a clear log of all actions taken

We want someone proactive who can take ownership of the process and reduce the amount of time we personally spend dealing with Amazon



What success looks like:

Faster and better-quality case submissions

Fewer unnecessary rejections

More successful approvals for the brands/categories we need

Clear communication and organised tracking of every application



To apply, please answer the following in your application:

What Amazon UK and US ungating experience do you have?

Which categories or brands have you successfully helped get approved?

What is your process when Amazon rejects an application?

Have you worked with invoices, LOAs, and supplier documentation before?

Please give 1–2 examples of successful ungating work you have done

Confirm that you only use compliant methods and genuine documents



We are looking for someone reliable and experienced who can start immediately.
